title: Ramp Car VS Police: CHASE
description: Experience a dangerous police chase as you drive a ramp car or a wedge truck through chaotic traffic.Game ModesChase: Start with a wanted level of 1 and cause as much chaos as possible.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Slime Farm!
description: Farm Slime: Slime Farm Simulator is a relaxing yet addictive game where you drive a suction truck to vacuum up unruly slimes and turn them into cash. Cruise smoothly through gooey fields, slurp with satisfying precision, sell your haul to upgrade your truck and expand your farm into a thriving slime empire.

title: Brawl Stars Battle
description: Brawl Stars Battle is an exciting action shooting game where you control powerful heroes armed with guns and special abilities to defeat opponents in fast-paced combat! Select 3v3 battle mode and fight alongside your teammates. The team that kills fifteen opponents first wins. Use guns and powerful abilities in intense battles.

title: Dear Island
description:
Collect two blocks that match the color of the Match Slot to clear them!
Clear them all to finish the stage!
Blocks of different colors can be placed in the Stock.
If the Stock gets full, it’s game over!

title: Stardom Alt-Girls Fashion Duel
description: Welcome to the world of daring alternative glamour! Meet two star heroines - Sydney and Sabrina. Help them go beyond the usual and try on the most daring alternative images: from a gentle soft-grunge princess to a gloomy rock diva. In the game, you can make bright makeup with arrows and sparkles; create unusual hairstyles; collect memorable outfits from tops, corsets, mini skirts and oversized jackets. Create your own collection of stunning Alt-girl looks!

title: Theo Morini's Magical Resort
description:
“Theo Morini’s Magical Resort” is a magical, romantic, and captivating merge puzzle game about rebuilding a resort on an enchanted island.

Talented writers and actors created this story and brought its characters to life. Enjoy the story!

title: Racing Ball Adventure
description:
Race down massive slopes at high speed through stunning green plains, cliffs, and canyons!
In this thrilling arcade adventure, collect the mystical Crystal to save the world from an impending disaster.
Grab your sphere and start your journey — an epic low-poly adventure awaits!

title: Fish Out of Water!
description:
Dive into a thrilling adventure with Fish Out of Water, without ads or in-app purchases. A captivating game by Halfbrick Studios, the creators of Fruit Ninja and Jetpack Joyride. Launch a group of brave fish pals into the sky and over the ocean, helping them travel far and bounce as much as possible!

Experience remastered graphics and audio and enjoy a rebalanced crystal unlocking system for a more rewarding experience.

title: Savage Defenders
description: A tower defense strategy action game where you become the last hope of a tribe living at the foot of an ancient volcano. When an asteroid with an alien threat falls to the planet, you must combine magic, tactics and the strength of warriors to stop the invader who is devouring all life.

title: Gun Shooting Games Sniper 3D
description: Step into the battlefield and test your precision in Gun Shooting Games: Sniper 3D, an exciting fps experience packed with nonstop action. This immersive first person shooting game puts you in the role of an elite sniper armed with powerful weapons and challenging missions.

title: Key Quest
description: Golden Key is a challenging escape game where you must solve a series of puzzles to escape mysterious rooms. Use logic and memory to find useful items, uncover secrets, and solve clever riddles until you discover the Golden Key.

title: No Pain No Gain - Ragdoll Sandbox
description: A ragdoll sandbox physics game where you place traps, cause pain, and earn coins for every hit. The more it hurts, the more you get.

title: Bloom Within: A life simulator
description:
The simulator of a pregnant mother allows you to fully experience the whole process of pregnancy.
In this anime game you have to play the role of a girl who has a loving husband and a child under her heart, who is waiting for her birth. Take care of yourself, give birth, take care of your baby and raise a healthy baby.

title: Math Master
description: Unleash your inner math whiz! Math Master turns numbers into art—solve fun math problems to unlock drawing tools, sketch colorful shapes, and bring numerical puzzles to life. Perfect for learners and creativity lovers alike!

title: Underwater Survival
description:
Dive Into a Mysterious and Beautiful Underwater World
Welcome to an unforgettable underwater survival adventure where exploration, discovery, and survival come together in a stunning ocean environment. Dive deep into a vibrant and mysterious sea filled with hidden secrets, breathtaking visuals, and endless possibilities.

title: World Soccer
description:
There are four objects, pull the object you want and fire it.
The object moves and pushes the other object or ball away
If you push the ball into the net before the opponent, you win!

title: Fish Love Pins
description: Fish Love Pins is a physics-based game that requires players to actively use their brains to figure out how to complete each level. The game is very easy to play, but as you progress through the levels, the difficulty gradually increases.

title: Arrow Tap Puzzle
description: Arrows fill the board like traffic at a silent crossing. Some lanes are open, others blocked. Remove arrows one by one, avoid blocked paths and keep your daily streak alive. Solve the arrangement in front of you, then step into another.

title: Toy Claw Simulator
description: Toy Claw Simulator is a fun and addictive arcade game where you take control of a virtual claw machine to collect a wide variety of adorable toys! Carefully aim and time your claw to grab plushies, action figures, and surprise collectibles. Once you've stocked up your toy inventory, head over to the factory to sell them for shiny coins! Use your earnings to run the machine to use the crane to unlock new toys. It's a charming blend of skill, strategy, and rewarding progression!

title: Doodle Dino Run
description: Doodle Dino Run delivers an addictive running adventure where you control a cute dinosaur, avoid dangers, and push your distance record farther every time you play. Featuring smooth side-scrolling gameplay, precise jump timing is essential to survive. Packed with action, this dinosaur adventure challenges your reflexes as the speed continuously increases.

title: Enchanted Mahjong Saga
description: Enchanted Mahjong Saga is a fast-paced twist on the classic tile-matching game, with unlimited levels to challenge your mind. Match tiles, beat the clock, and keep your streak alive as each level gets tougher and more exciting. Feeling stuck? Use helpful hints to get back on track and stay in the game.Whether youre playing for a quick break or settling in for a longer session, theres always a new puzzle waiting.

title: Suitable Outfit Dressup
description: Suitable Outfit Dressup is a fashionable and exciting dress up game. If you are a big fan of fashion games, then you will surely enjoy this game! Try different dress styles, hairstyles to make your anime girl character stand out and show off your skills as a fashion line master in the game! Have fun playing!

title: Paper Doll Diary - Chibi Dolls
description: With Paper Doll Diary - Chibi Dolls, users can unleash their creativity and design unique outfits for their dolls. The game offers a wide range of clothing options, accessories, and hairstyles to choose from, allowing players to mix and match to their heart's content.

title: Revoxel 3D - Voxel RPG Shooter
description: Immerse yourself in a dynamic voxel-style RPG shooter with a cyberpunk atmosphere. A dark futuristic city overrun by a tech corporation awaits you, along with endless battles with robots and monsters, character development, and constant action in the spirit of a shooter RPG.

title: Office Knight 3D: Castle Defense
description:
Office Warrior: Wield swords and axes as skillfully as a stapler!
Action Battles: Fight various enemies in dynamic 3D environments.
Progression System: Level up, improve health and damage right in the heat of battle.
Weapon & Upgrade Shop: Collect coins to buy hero upgrades and equip yourself.
Endless Challenge: Deflect waves of enemies and prove you are the ultimate defender!

title: Fishing the Russian Way
description:
Embark on a journey through Central Russia: picturesque rivers and lakes, different types of fish, and the exciting process of fishing. Improve your tackle, control your rod, decide the fate of your catch, and add to your collection of rare finds.

Use your car to discover new locations, complete tasks, participate in tournaments, and receive daily rewards. Freedom of choice and the path to becoming a true fishing master await you!

title: Grandma with machine-gun: Apocalypsis
description:
Granny is in a hurry to get home and bake some pies. But there's one problem - first she needs to bake a few hundred zombies! They'll be chasing you in cars and motorcycles, they'll have machine guns, rocket launchers, and support drones.
But you've got a pretty good arsenal too - from a revolver and machine guns to a minigun and a bazooka.
Help Granny get home, roast them all!

title: Neon Blast
description: Upgrade your defense cannons by merging them!Watch as your cannons level up and become powerful defenders, and get exciting new powers to crush bosses and attackers!

title: Cupid Unchained
description:
Take aim, shoot true, and break the chains of fate!
Rescue trapped souls using your trusty bow as you solve clever physics puzzles, shatter chains, and free everyone before time runs out!

title: Smash Defense
description: Smash Defense is a chaotic baseball-inspired action game where your swings decide the fate of entire worlds. Crush waves of flying monsters using your bat and evolve your ball with fiery, electric, and explosive powers. Travel through dynamic environments like deep oceans and erupting volcanoes, upgrade your skills, and prove you’re the ultimate monster-slaying champion.

title: Number Rush
description:
You can absorb smaller or equal numbers while avoiding obstacles.
If you collide with a number bigger than you, it's game over.
Make the largest number possible to break through the wall and get the treasure chest~!

title: Idle Barber Shop
description: Play Idle Barber Shop free online and run your own salon in a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Hire barbers, upgrade stations, style fresh cuts, and grow profits in a smart tycoon experience that feels like a light brain game of strategy and timing. This unblocked game works smoothly at school or home, is fully mobile-friendly, and runs perfectly on desktop and mobile. A free online game made for quick breaks and relaxing play.

title: Italian Brainrot in Geometry Dash
description:
Italian Brainrot in Geometry Dash:
Explore a world where a geometric wave rushes through crazy obstacles, overcoming challenges one after another. Rhythm, chaos, and a splash of Italian madness — test your reaction and endurance in this geometric trial!

On different levels, you’ll encounter various Italian Brainrot animals: Tralalero Tralala, Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Brr Brr Patapim, Lirili Larila.

title: Tung Sahur Coloring
description: Tung Sahur Coloring is a colorful joyride just waiting to happen! This super fun coloring game for kids turns every blank page into a chance to sparkle with creativity. Grab your virtual crayons and get ready to dive into the world of Tung Sahur, where imagination runs wild and colors know no rules. From cheerful characters to wacky shapes, each page is your personal canvas. Fill it with the wildest colors you can think of—green suns, purple trees, rainbow hats—anything goes here!

title: LABUBU MERGE CLICKER
description:
Enter the wacky world of Labubu and the Monster Crew — merge mischievous Labubus, unlock rare forms, and climb your way to the top!
Boom! Crash! Roar! The gang’s all here — how far can you go before the box overflows?

title: Last Ufo Defense
description:
Last UFO DefenseThe galaxy is no safe place. 
As the last UFO of your kind, you stand alone against endless waves of hostile alien forces determined to wipe you out.
Pilot your hovering warship and unleash its full potential:One UFO, endless enemies. 
Survive as long as you can with precise upgrades and tactical choices.
Face relentless alien swarms in an endless survival challenge.You are the final line of defense in a hostile galaxy.
How long can the last UFO endure?

title: Sort Game Toy Sort
description: Enjoy some adorable sorting fun in Sort Game: Toy Sort. This delightful match 3 puzzle and casual sort game challenges you to organize colorful dolls and toys. Match and eliminate all dolls within the limited time. When you encounter difficulties, use items to help you quickly clear the level. Such as Convert, Eliminate, Refresh or Break.

title: Brainrot Mob Clash 3D
description: Welcome to the wild and chaotic world of Brainrot Mob Clash 3D. It’s a full-blown racing and fighting adventure. Dash through 3D obstacle courses, avoid deadly traps like spikes and spinning saws. Match and merge your stickman army. Crush enemy mobs in exciting action-packed battles. As you run, collect brainrot characters to increase your numbers and merge them to form powerful units.

title: Brainrot World Hole.io
description: Brainrot World Hole.io is a hilarious casual hole game packed with chaotic brainrot energy and funny Italian meme vibes. Control a growing hole and dive into a crazy world where swallowing everything in sight is the key to victory. Move around the map and collect objects smaller than your hole.

title: Poopy Escape The Prison
description: Help Poopy, a mischievous (and slightly stinky) inmate, break out of a maximum-security prison! Navigate through hazardous cells, evade ruthless guards, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden paths to escape. But beware—one wrong move, and Poopy lands in solitary confinement!

title: Hexa Stack
description: Welcome to Hexa Stack—an all-new hexagon puzzle that’s equal parts relaxing and challenging. Sort colorful tiles by color, stack smart to create powerful combos, and think ahead before the board fills up. Each level adds new twists, requiring focus, memory, and clever planning. Stuck? Use boosters like swap and shuffle to keep your run alive. Simple controls, satisfying merges, and nonstop brain fun!

title: Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly
description: This is a first-person psychological horror game where you work night shifts in a small street kiosk. What seems like a normal job quickly turns into a nightmare: customers grow increasingly strange, and reality itself begins to warp. Some people just want to eat — others are only pretending to be human.

title: Snake Masters
description:
Control a small worm and get ready to reach the other side of the screen. Enjoy a puzzle inspired by the classic Snake, where you must guide the worm to the other side of the apple and escape safely. Will you be smart enough to beat all thirty levels?

Game Features
- Special crawling mechanics.
- Challenge your brain.
- Tons of interesting puzzles.
- Easy controls.

title: Daily Jewels Blitz Mahjong
description: Enjoy Daily Mahjong with a sparkling jewels twist! Play a unique layout every day, match dazzling gem tiles, and keep your streak alive to earn boosters like Hint, Shuffle, Undo, and Torch. Track your longest streak and collect daily rewards as you match your way through beautiful designs. Miss a day? There’s a rare chance to recover it. Relax, match, and dive into the timeless charm of Daily Mahjong with a brilliant jewels theme!

title: Unblock it Atlantis
description: Dive into the underwater world of Unblock It 3D: Atlantis and test your logic with endless brain-teasing puzzles! Rotate the puzzle cube to reveal which blocks you can slide away. Discover a vast collection of levels inspired by the lost city of Atlantis, featuring stone tiles textured like coral, shimmering pearl finishes, and sea flora woven through ancient ruins. Unlock new cube styles, explore vibrant oceanic themes, and keep your mind sharp as the puzzles grow more complex.

title: Boat Mania
description: Play Boat Racing Mania free online and hit the waves in a high-speed browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Race rival captains, collect upgrades, and master tight turns in a skill-based challenge that feels like a fast reflex brain game. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for nonstop water racing action anytime.

title: Slippery Drift Racing
description: Slippery Drift Racing is an adrenaline-pumping racing game where precision and speed go hand in hand. Players can choose between Race and Time Attack modes, tackling five unique and challenging maps. With three difficulty levels—Easy, Normal, and Hard—drivers of all skill levels can enjoy sliding through tight corners, mastering drifts, and racing against the clock or opponents. Perfect for fans of high-speed thrills and skillful maneuvers, every race promises excitement and challenge!

title: Fashion Heroes Academy
description: Welcome to the Academy of Fashion Heroines, a place where style and superpowers go hand in hand! Three brave girls entered the academy in order not only to reveal their abilities, but also to create their own unique image. And you will help them in this. Choose outfits for studying, training and super battles. Experiment with makeup and accessories. Let each schoolgirl become a superhero and a style icon at the same time!

title: Zombie Eeaster Bunnies
description: You are in abandoned village infested with zombie bunnies. You are there because you love the their delicious colored eggs. You need them, but the evil rabbits won't let you go away with them so easily. Kill or escape from the evil bunnies, collect us many easter eggs as you can and leave the village alive if you can. Use your powerful laser gun to destroy the evil rabbits and collect the ammunition scattered around the village. Watch your back! The Zombie Bunnies are silent and deadly!

title: Pet Merge
description:
Merge adorable pets! 
Combine cute companions to unlock rare and magical species. 
Pass exciting levels in adventure mode or beat your high score in the classic mode.
Let's Play! Meow

title: Energy Factory Idle
description: Energy Factory Idle is a relaxing idle factory game where you build and upgrade your own energy production system. Start with a small generator and turn it into a powerful factory by hiring workers, improving speed and output, and unlocking new generators. Your factory keeps working even while offline, letting you collect rewards and grow step by step. Simple controls, smooth progression, and a calm idle tycoon experience—perfect for short or long play sessions.

title: Happy Fluffy Cubes
description: Happy Fluffy Cubes is a bright and fun 3D runner with adorable cube heroes, tricky traps, and a collection system! Choose your Fluffy and fly through levels full of danger: fire, ice, lasers, and spinning saws! Simple one-touch control, but surviving takes focus and reflexes.

title: Push.io
description: Push.io is a fast-paced arena game where you battle to stay on the map and push everyone else off. Wield your boomerang with precision to knock rivals into the water while dodging incoming attacks. The longer you survive, the higher you rank; fall early, and you’ll drop in the standings. Earn trophies, upgrade your boomerang between rounds, and rise through the ranks to become the ultimate arena champion.

title: SuperPixelint
description:
It's a game where you draw a cute little image.
You can develop color matching skills and accuracy without any burden.
Why don't you get out of your daily life for a while and heal yourself through coloring games?

title: Skillful Finger
description: Touch the screen and slide your finger along the glowing line without lifting it. Avoid barriers, stay clear of the edges, and react quickly as the speed increases. Customize your ball and tail, face dynamic obstacles, and enjoy endlessly generated paths that keep every run fast, challenging, and addictive.

title: Block Merge City
description: Block Merge City is a relaxing isometric puzzle game where you place and combine buildings to evolve them into bigger structures. Strategically plan your moves, score high, and avoid running out of space!

title: Sum Master
description: Sum Master is an engaging and challenging number puzzle game designed to enhance your mental arithmetic and logical reasoning skills. The objective is to select numbers within a grid so that the sums of each row, column, and colored region match the specified targets. Each puzzle has a unique solution, requiring players to carefully consider which numbers to include or exclude. The game offers a stimulating experience that combines fun with educational value.

title: Hot & Cold Winter Style
description: Princesses Eliza and Milana are going on winter vacation, but for each of the girls, winter vacation will be special. Eliza lives in snowy regions and loves fluffy fur coats, warm scarves and winter dresses. Milana celebrates her holidays under palm trees and chooses swimsuits, light capes and bright accessories. Players will have to create stylish images, combining the cold shine of snow and the warm glow of the tropics. Help Eliza and Milana become the most fashionable princesses of winter!

title: Diamond mosaic
description: Ready to create your own masterpiece from a scattering of diamonds on your screen? Come to our mosaic!  Fill images with diamond scatter!

title: Xytrian Runner
description: Xytrian is an endless flight runner where you pilot a spaceship through a dangerous course. Dodge obstacles, score points, and survive as long as you can! Click to control your shuttle and hit the timing perfectly! Only precise altitude changes will let you overcome the obstacles ahead.

title: Association - Connect Word
description: Dive into the world of word puzzles and associations! In this game, you need to find hidden connections between words and group them logically. Each level offers new themes, new words, and increasingly challenging tasks. The game develops thinking, expands vocabulary, and trains attention. Intuition and logic will help you complete dozens of levels, from easy to hard, and become a true master of associations. Play at your own pace without time limits and use hints if needed.

title: Home Block Story
description: Step into a world of renovation! Match blocks, clear the board and unlock new decor to design your house just the way you want. With each new challenge, show your unique style and make your dream home a reality.

title: Arrow Escape
description: Get ready for a fast-paced and strategic arrow challenge in Arrow Escape, an addictive arrows puzzle escape game built for players who love logic puzzles and intense puzzle escape moments.

title: Farm Blast
description: Farm Blast is a colorful level-based blast puzzle game set on a vibrant farm. Complete exciting objectives, overcome tricky obstacles, and unlock powerful boosters as you progress through hundreds of engaging levels. With bright visuals, satisfying chain reactions, and strategic gameplay, this addictive casual puzzle game is perfect for fans of match-3 games, farm games, and relaxing yet challenging brain teasers.

title: FNF Unblocked​ Italian Brainrot
description: Face a funny musical battle. FNF Unblocked - Italian Brainrot brings the classic FNF gameplay into the chaotic world of Italian brainrot. Hit the right arrow keys on beat to win rap battles. Face bizarre and iconic opponents like Sponge, Mustard, Sprunki, and other meme legends. Each level has a different style of music, even a little horror, so you can't help but sway to it! In addition, you can experience another gameplay.

title: Chocolate Dream: Idle Factory
description: Play Chocolate Dream: Idle Factory free online and build your candy empire in a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Produce chocolate bars, upgrade machines, and expand smart production lines in a strategy experience that feels like a rewarding brain game. This unblocked game runs smoothly at school or home and is fully mobile-friendly. Optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game perfect for quick breaks or long, satisfying factory.

title: Happy ASMR Care
description: Happy ASMR Care is a fun cleaning simulator game. When life starts to get messy, its time to clean. This game offers you four modes of cleaning, including cleaning turtle barnacles, carpet cleaning, shaving, and hoof trimming. What do you prefer to clean? Come join us to start your cleaning journey!

title: Dark Academia Wedding
description: Step into a world of moody elegance in Dark Academia Wedding! Help the bride and groom prepare for their enchanting, gothic-inspired celebration. Choose vintage dresses, romantic accessories, and rich color palettes that capture the essence of dark academia. From candlelit ceremonies to mysterious venues, every detail matters. Create the perfect blend of classic romance and intellectual charm in this stylish wedding dress up game!

title: Hide and Luig
description: Hide and Luig is a whimsical point-and-click hide-and-seek adventure where your only goal is to find the ever-elusive Luig—who insists on hiding inside the weirdest objects imaginable.

title: Stickman Rescue Draw 2 Save
description: Your brain is the only shield for the stickman! Enjoy a super casual puzzler in the Stickman Rescue - Draw 2 Save. Use your finger to draw lines and save the stickman from danger! In each level, the stickman is in trouble, such as falling rocks, flying arrows, deep pits, etc. It’s up to you to draw a safe shield, a bridge, or a clever device to keep him safe and complete your rescue mission!

title: Shoot 2048 Hexa
description: Shoot 2048 Hexa is a fun and colorful puzzle game where you shoot hexagon tiles with numbers to make bigger ones. Aim carefully and match the same numbers to reach new values. The board slowly fills up, so think fast and plan your moves. Try to stay in the game as long as you can and get the highest score!

title: Bubble classic
description: The goal of the game is not to lose as early as possible and to score as many points as possible. Improve your accuracy thanks to very competent rolling of balls. The more blocks with balls you destroy, the more points you accumulate. Check your results in the world rankings, maybe you are already number 1.

title: Arcade GP
description: ARCADE GP is a retro-style top-down Formula 1 racing game with strategic tire management and pit stop mechanics. Race against AI opponents, manage tire wear, and make tactical decisions to claim victory!

title: Backrooms
description:
Trapped in the eerie maze of the Backrooms, your only goal is to escape or survive, trying.
Play solo or team up with friends in this online multiplayer horror experience. Explore surreal levels, avoid lurking entities, solve puzzles, and use proximity voice chat to stay connected… and stay alive.

title: Feet Doctor Urgency Care
description:
As a podiatrist in this medical simulation game, treat various urgent foot conditions and save patients. As a doctor, you will take care of the patient's feet.
Use all tools to cure them.

title: Sprunki Garden
description: Welcome to Sprunki Garden – a wild match-3 puzzle adventure inspired by the legendary Sprunki meme! Match colorful Sprunki characters across 100 hilarious levels filled with chaos, charm, and absurdity. Every move connects you with the bizarre Sprunki universe, where each character is weirder than the last. Get ready to swipe, match, and laugh your way through the most brainrotted garden ever!

title: Basketball Life 3d
description: Ready for the wonderful basketball challenge? Basketball Life 3D is a fun and creative sports game that tests your skills and timing! From classic hoop challenges to trick shots, every level is packed with excitement.

title: Click Kitty Idle
description:
Click Kitty Idle– Fast-Paced Cat Clicker Challenge!
Click Kitty Idle is a fun and competitive idle clicker game where speed, timing, and strategy matter! Tap to feed your kitty, level up, and dominate the leaderboard in this addictively cute cat-clicking game!                                             
Why You’ll Love It:
If you enjoy fast-paced clicker games with a twist, It’s not just about clicking—it's about clicking smart and fast.
Play now and prove you’ve got the fastest paws in town!

title: Woody Hexa
description: Woody Hexa is a visually engaging puzzle game that challenges players to complete 250 levels by strategically arranging hexagonal blocks by color. With simple drag-and-drop controls and increasingly complex layouts, each level tests your logic and spatial awareness. Combining relaxing gameplay with clever merging mechanics, Woody Hexa offers a satisfying brain workout perfect for all ages.

title: Barbee Met Gala Transformation
description: Barbee and her friends have a big night ahead—the Met Gala! It’s your job to help each of them get dressed up and feel amazing. Whether someone’s into bold colors or classic glam, you get to style their look from head to toe and make sure they’re ready to walk the red carpet.

title: Latutu Holiday Gift Hunt
description: Latutu’s Holiday Gift Hunt is a cheerful matching game where you search through a pile of cute holiday toys and gifts to find three identical items. Drag each match into your slots to create a trio and clear space for more. With its cozy holiday theme, adorable Latutu characters, and satisfying match-and-clear gameplay, this game offers a relaxing yet exciting experience for all ages. Perfect for short sessions or high-score chasing during the festive season.

title: Lava Jump
description: Lava Jump is a fast-paced parkour platformer set in a deadly lava-filled dungeon! Jump across moving blocks, bounce off boost pads, and ride shifting platforms to survive. Complete more than 25 levels, evade enemies, spikes and other deadly objects and escape from the lava dungeon alive. Collect coins and get new characters to use in your adventure.

title: Volley Beans - Volleyball Game
description: Get ready to become the best volleyball player of all time! Jump right now into this cute and simple, yet challenging volleyball game!

title: Stickman Fight Pro
description: Stickman Fight Pro is an action-packed, fast-paced fighting game featuring simple yet intense gameplay. Players control a stickman character in a variety of challenging arenas, engaging in battles against other stickmen or AI opponents. The game emphasizes quick reflexes, strategic moves, and a variety of weapons and power-ups to outmaneuver and defeat enemies.

title: Bubble Shooter Ultimate
description: Bubble shooter ultimate is a classic bubble shooter game with a modern twist. Each level-up you get to chose a power up like a change to get a bomb or rainbow bubble and more. Create combinations of three or more matching bubbles by launching bubbles of the same color at them. The more bubbles you pop in a single shot, the higher your score. If you miss a match 5 times, the playing field moves down by one row. The objective is to score as many points as possible while clearing all the bubbles!

title: Block Craft 3d
description: Block Craft 3D is a first-person RPG game with 3D pixel Minecraft models. Starting from a block base, you can attack the monsters outside to claim diamonds with weapons. I strongly suggest you build bombs to destroy terrains or build blocks to make yourself safe. When you earn enough diamonds, you can unlock and use 4 Melee weapons, 11 guns, and 8 bombs in the store. Glad you will have a good time in this block world.

title: Road Digging Puzzle
description:
This is a puzzle game. you can make a way to pass a level. Dig your way through unique physics puzzles.

It's new and fun brain teasers each step of the way.

title: Bubble Shooter Wonders of Egypt
description: Journey into an ancient Egyptian night in Bubble Shooter Pyramid Quest! Match and pop glossy bubbles to climb rising score goals. Fill the goal bar to trigger quick celebrations, then push onward as the ceiling creeps closer. Beat your High score, earn a second chance with a rewarded continue, and watch desert backdrops shift as you progress. Easy to start, hard to master—aim, bounce, and clear your way to legend! Start in Beginner, then unlock Medium and Hard as your score surges ever higher!

title: Merge Smith
description:
If you combine the same items, a higher level of items will be created.
Make legendary items and become the best blacksmith.

title: Stellar Fusion
description:
Enter the captivating universe of Celestia —
As the stellar Alchemist, you alone possess the power to restore cosmic balance. Manipulate essences represented by vibrant tiles and solve intricate puzzles to restore balance in Stellar Fusion!

title: Closed City
description: Shooting game about a quarantined city due to the threat of infection with a zombie virus. The main gameplay will revolve around the fact that you will need to survive in this difficult, riddled city.

title: Beach Club
description:
Calm down and manage your Beach Club!
Relax while listening to the waves, the ocean and some gulls. And soon you'll feel like you're floating around at the beach...
Let your helpers do all the work, stroll through the sand and collect the money from your customers.
Unlock new stuff so that even more people will come to your beach :D

Buy more seats, expand your beach and build your own empire!
Get some clean towels and make your Beach Club the most beautiful place.

title: Merge Drop
description: Buy and merge balls. Drop them to break the cubes. Every ball will multiply when they touch the cubes. If your balls can reach the end of the level you win.

title: ASMR Water vs Fire
description:
Water vs Fire, upgrade your water power and damp down the fire!
And Have fun!

Upgrade your Water Power and your Amount of Canister.


- Easy intuitive controls
- Release to shoot

title: Sailor Chic vs Pirate Charm
description: Welcome to the trendy sea adventure! Two charming heroines are waiting for you in game: the humble little mermaid Amelie and the brave pirate princess Jacqueline. Amelie is the epitome of maritime glamour. Her style is white dresses, gold jewelry and wind in her hair. Jacqueline is the real pirate queen. She wears leather jackets, spectacular corsets and accessories with pirate symbols. Who will win in this fashionable battle - a sophisticated beauty or a daring sea robber? The choice is yours!

title: Impostor among us: Escape from prison
description:
The traitor ended up in a space prison. But the impostor does not plan to stay there for long. You play as an impostor who must go through all the traps, solve puzzles and kill all the enemies on the level. Once the imposter has neutralized all the amogus, he will be able to break out of prison. But the evil among will not let you go into space so easily.

- 100+ varied and colorful levels.
- To kill the enemy you need to approach him.
- Logic tasks and puzzles!
- Boss battles!

title: Brain Test IQ Challenge 2
description: Ready for the wonderful challenge of your brain power? Brain Test IQ Challenge 2 is here! This is a brainstorming puzzle game that combines drawing, jumping, multiplayer battle, maze escape and other ways to play. Activate your brain in a second! In draw master, underlining guides the character into the correct restroom.

title: Online Cats Multiplayer Park
description: Come to run, jump, guess, and race as a cute but competitive kitty in Online Cats - Multiplayer Park. It’s a real-time multiplayer chaos arena. Here are seven modes you can choose from. In Grab A Shabby Ball, for example, you will have to compete with your opponents and try to touch the ball to get points.

title: Elemental Gloves Magic Power
description: Elemental Gloves - Magic Power is a superpower arcade game.  Experience the fun of superpowers in magic games? Fascinated by elemental games? In this game, you can use the superpowers in the magic gloves to fight with your enemies. Shooting with flames, attacking with lightning, and attacking with electromagnetic waves, are three ways for you to choose. Don't hesitate to take the opportunity to practice real elemental magic and wipe out the bad guys. Become the greatest elemental master!

title: Cat Evolution 2
description:
Tap. Evolve. Dominate the Cat Kingdom!

The cats are back, and this time, they're taking over with the power of your fingertips! In Cat Evolution 2,  evolution goes clicker-style.
Tap your way through generations of quirky cats, unlock bizarre and adorable mutations, evolve to the max.

Get your paws ready and your fingers tapping. Cat Evolution 2 is the ultimate idle cat clicker you didn’t know you needed!

title: SUIKA WATERMELON DROP
description: Engage, merge, and challenge yourself in this thrilling fruit-matching journey! Drop and collide identical fruits to evolve them, preventing them from falling out of the box. But here's the exciting twist: every time matching fruits collide, they transform into a completely new one. Can you keep merging your way up to the ultimate prize, the grand watermelon? The challenge awaits!

title: Pixel Number - DIY Coloring
description: Unleash your creativity with Pixel Number – DIY Coloring! Choose from a huge collection of pixel art images – from cute animals to cool patterns – and bring them to life with color.

title: Hydraulic Press 2D ASMR
description: You have in your hands a terrifying power that gives you the ability to grind dozens of objects! A very effective stress reliever. Try out your personal hydraulic press right now and start destroying all objects! Crush, crush, break!

title: Obby: Tsunami Escape +1 by Car
description:
A giant tsunami is approaching - and only you can outrun it! Dodge the waves, upgrade your car, and race to the finish line. The faster you get, the further you can go.

Buy new cars - each one gives you more speed, control, and capabilities.
Upgrade your vehicles to survive the most challenging races.
Defeat brainrots - from common to rare and legendary ones.
Practice, improve your reactions, and find the perfect strategy.

title: Survival Island
description:
Hey kids! Are you ready for a thrilling island survival adventure? In Survival Island, you’ll explore a mysterious island full of surprises! Cut down trees with your axe, mine rocks, gather grass, and fish to keep your energy up. Produce food to stay strong and upgrade your skills to survive longer.

Whether it’s day, night, or stormy, anything can happen! Explore caves, swim, and boost your speed and capacity. Get ready for a fun-filled survival journey in Survival Island!

title: BFFs Golden Hour
description: Fall is here and the BFFs decided to take the perfect photos with their Instagram-worthy makeup and outfits. Elsa, Ellie, Kiki, and Regina are all in charge of getting amazing images for their fall aesthetics album, so make sure you come and join them in their BFFs Golden Hour dress up game for girls! Help them get ready by dressing them up with a variety of beautiful outfits, accessories and makeup styles then snap the most instagrammable pictures you need for their album. Enjoy playing!

title: Brainrot Clicker
description:
Brainrot Clicker is a hilarious and chaotic idle clicker game that plunges you into a bizarre world of meme-fueled madness. Your mission is simple: tap the screen to earn “Italian Brainrot Points” and unlock increasingly ridiculous AI-generated characters from the internet’s wildest corners.

With eye-catching visuals, meme-inspired humor, and endless upgrades, Brainrot Clicker offers a weirdly satisfying experience you won’t want to stop!

title: Block Up
description: Block Up Contrast is a minimalist arcade game where you need a moving block upward through an endless series of obstacles. The challenge is to avoid barriers of contrasting colors while collecting points. The game requires precise timing and quick reflexes as the speed increases. With simple yet engaging gameplay, Block Up Contrast offers an addictive experience for players.

title: Obby Yard Sale
description:
Open your own trade right in the yard of your house! Order boxes with mysterious goods, unpack them and put them up for sale to passers-by. Each item can be common or rare and legendary, which makes every purchase special.
Keep an eye on your yard: buyers not only buy goods, but also try to steal them. Your task is to stop the thief in time and collect a collection of all types of items, turning simple yard trading into an exciting adventure.

title: Slingshot Fortress
description: Slingshot Fortress is an addictive 2D physics-based destruction game where precision, timing, and strategy are essential. Use your slingshot to launch stones, bombs, and shurikens to destroy towers, collapse structures, and uncover hidden enemies. Explore vibrant levels from forests to icy lands, unlock powerful abilities, trigger explosive chain reactions, and master increasingly challenging puzzles in this fun, casual browser game experience.

title: Special Holiday Solitaire
description:
Step into a festive world of fun with Special Holiday Solitaire! This cheerful card game combines classic solitaire gameplay with a holiday twist, creating the perfect escape for players of all ages.  
Whether you're looking for a relaxing break or a way to get into the holiday spirit, *Special Holiday Solitaire* is the perfect companion for the season. Challenge yourself, enjoy the magic of the holidays, and spread the festive cheer!

title: Satisdom
description: Step into the calm and quirky world of Satisdom — a game where every little task feels oddly satisfying. Whether you're dragging, tapping, sorting or matching, each level is a chance to relax and have fun. Designed to run smoothly on both phones and computers, Satisdom is the perfect escape for anyone who loves simple pleasures and playful puzzles. Slow down, enjoy the details, and let yourself get lost in the fun.

title: The Office Escape
description: The Office Escape is an exciting adventure where every step towards freedom becomes a test for the Regime and the thinking factor!

title: Sheep vs Wolf
description:
Protect the sheeps by blocking the wolf's way.
Simply click on tiles to block it. Every time you make a move The Wolf makes a move. So, be careful for the tile you block!

title: Parking Fury 3D: Beach City 2
description: Parking Fury 3D: Beach City 2 takes you to a vibrant town by the beach where you can test your driving and parking skills in a variety of supercars. Complete challenging parking missions while exploring the scenic coastal streets. You can switch cars on the map, but watch out for the police - get caught stealing a vehicle, and it’s game over! Can you master the art of parking in Beach City without getting busted?

title: Emoji Guess
description: Welcome to the entertaining world of Emoji Guess, a game where every emoji hides a clue. Use your creativity and logic to decode famous phrases, sayings, and movie titles represented by emoji sequences. Each level brings a fresh challenge that will test your imagination and make you smile. Play for free on your phone or computer and see how fluent you are in the universal language of emojis!

title: My Arcade Center 2
description:
My Arcade Center 2 is a fast-paced arcade management tycoon game.

Build, customize, and expand your own arcade across 7 unique maps. Earn by day, upgrade by night, unlock new machines, hire staff, optimize layouts, and grow your business. Switch between centers anytime, unlock new characters and skins, complete daily missions, and boost your long-term progress with rewarding upgrades.

title: Sprunki Find The Differences
description:
Unleash Your Detective Skills with Sprunki Find The Differences!
Inspired by the charming world of Sprunki, this game takes your observation skills to the next level. Dive into beautifully crafted scenes filled with vibrant details, where your task is to spot the differences between two seemingly identical images.
Whether you're a fan of Sprunki or just love a good brain teaser, Sprunki Find The Differences offers a perfect mix of challenge and fun for players of all ages

title: Magic Bottles
description: Magic Bottles is a calming yet cleverly challenging color-sorting puzzle game. Pour liquids between bottles until each one contains only a single color. While the rules are simple, levels become increasingly complex, introducing new bottle types, tricky layouts, and situations that demand careful planning. Perfect for puzzle fans and players who enjoy logical challenges, Magic Bottles offers a relaxing yet engaging brain-training experience. Restore perfect order, one puzzle at a time.

title: Shopaholic Black Friday
description: Experience fashion fun like never before with the Shopaholic Black Friday game! Navigate through makeup products, and indulge in chic fashion pieces. Hit the mall, shop as many items as you can before the time runs out, and then return for another styling adventure. Explore an array of lipstick hues, experiment with smoky eyes, or go for colorful shadows, and browse through fashionable dresses, trendy tops, and stylish shoes. Complete the look with dazzling accessories and designer bags.

title: Pet Runner
description: Pet Runner is a fast-paced platformer where your pet runs forward automatically, and you must jump, dodge obstacles, defeat enemies, and collect coins. Play in Endless Mode for infinite fun or tackle unique challenges in Level Mode. Use up to three lives, hit checkpoints, and complete daily challenges to earn coins. Unlock and customize adorable pets in the shop to enhance your adventure. With its exciting gameplay and charming rewards, Pet Runner offers fun for all ages!

title: Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour
description: Step into the absurd universe of Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour, where chaos, memes, and tricky obstacle runs collide! Pick your favorite Brainrot characters, master wild parkour tracks, and survive each hilarious stage with your reflexes and timing.

title: Stickman battle 1-4 Players
description:
Cool collection of dynamic action games!

Fight with rotating weapons, score goals in football, Take first place in a long race, Complete difficult survival levels and much more.

There is a quick round for a couple of minutes and a tournament for several rounds.

You can play up to 4 players, play with friends and bots.
You can change the player's appearance: change cars, faces, color.

Play and have a lot of fun!

title: Gross Out Run
description: Gross Out Run is a parkour game. Compete against two other AI runners and the first player to reach the finish line wins! Be careful, you have to avoid the sledgehammers on the road, which will block your progress and stain your clothes simultaneously. It's time to make a change! Can you get to the finish line first and keep yourself tidy?

title: Code Maze
description: Master programming logic with Code Maze! Use code blocks to navigate mazes, overcome obstacles, and reach goals. Each level challenges your problem-solving skills. Ready to code your way out?

title: DriftClicker
description:
Race Clicker: DRIFT MAX is an action clicker that immerses you in the world of thrilling drift races, demanding lightning-fast reflexes and the ability to make decisions at high speed. Participate in dynamic drift where every turn is a high-speed challenge.
- Open containers to obtain unique parts and enhance your car.
- Participate in high-stakes races to earn keys for containers and unlock new possibilities.
- Upgrade your car to dominate races and defeat all your rivals.

title: Hidden Objects Bakery
description: Explore 6 charming bakery shops in this fun hidden object game! With 24 exciting levels, find 6 hidden bakery items in each shop before time runs out. Perfect for all ages, enjoy the challenge and discover delicious treats in every corner. Can you find them all before time runs out?

title: Lights Out
description: Lights Out is a minimalist puzzle platformer with a twist: the level is pitch black. Reveal your surroundings by emitting light, but there's a catch: you can't move while the lights are on. Memorize in the dark to move in the light. Master timing, memory, and reflexes to conquer each world’s unique mechanics.

title: Papa Buzja
description:
Papa Buzja brings good things home! He feeds the children, brings them books, makes supplies and builds a house. The path will pass through wide fields, dense forest, squelching swamp and high mountains.
Difficultes and adventures await Papa Buzja along the way. 
Whatever happens on the way, remember: the kids are waiting for you!

title: Gun Match Screw
description: a unique level-based puzzle game that combines screw puzzles with exciting gun-themed mechanics. In this game, each level presents you with a board shaped like different guns or gun parts, and your goal is to unlock all the boards by matching colored screws, which are represented as bullets.

title: Sort Works: Nuts & Order
description:
Sort Works: Nuts & Order is a fun color-sorting puzzle game where you organize colorful nuts onto matching bolts.

? How to Play:

* Tap a bolt to pick up the top nut.
* Drop it onto a matching color or empty bolt.
* Sort all nuts by color to win!

? Easy to learn, challenging to master, with hundreds of levels and a clean mechanical design—perfect for puzzle fans and casual gamers!

title: Hero Ragdoll Fighting
description:
Sahur Ragdoll Fighting Game is a dynamic action game in which you have to prove to everyone that Tung Tung Tung Sahur has no equal! ?

? Play as Sahur with a huge arsenal of weapons! Fight in different modes:
— Survival: defeat wave after wave of enemies
— Campaign: complete levels with different opponents and mechanics Maya

title: Rope Rescue! - Unique Puzzle
description: Rope Rescue is a puzzle game with simple controls but a challenging twist. Strategize to save everyone using ropes while dodging tricky traps and obstacles. Stay sharp to overcome each level and claim exciting rewards. With its easy-to-learn mechanics and increasingly complex challenges, this game will keep you hooked as you perfect your rescue skills!

title: Sudoku Brain Blocks
description: Sudoku Brain Blocks is a relaxing yet addictive online puzzle game that blends classic Sudoku logic with block-fitting challenges (Tetris style). Drag and drop various shaped blocks onto a 9×9 grid to complete full rows, columns, or 3×3 squares to clear the board and earn high scores. Use strategy and planning to avoid running out of space and test your brain with every move!

title: FreeCell
description: Unlike other card games that rely on luck, almost every game of FreeCell is solvable—if you have the skill. Use the four open "free cells" as temporary holders to juggle your cards and organize the chaotic tableau. Plan your moves carefully, stack cards by alternating colors, and clear the board. Whether you want a relaxing break or a serious brain workout, this is the perfect puzzle for you.

title: Car Dealer Idle
description: Ever dreamed of becoming a top Car Dealer? In Car Dealer Idle, you’ll manage your own vehicle business. Buy and sell cars, expand your showroom, and grow into a real tycoon. Make smart management decisions, upgrade your dealership, and watch your profits skyrocket. Unlock more booths to sell cooler vehicles. Unlock repair areas, test drive areas, etc.

title: Perfect Piano Magic
description: Perfect Piano Magic is a fun casual game. If you are a big fan of Piano Magic games, then this is a game you can't afford to miss! The gameplay of this game is extremely similar to Piano Magic, you need to shoot the blocks with a gun to capture the beat. You have three chances per game, start now and feel the real music when you click the blocks, enjoy the beats, and get ready to experience the delightful music and become a rhythm master!

title: Dolphin Couple Underwater Dress Up
description: In Dolphin Couple Underwater Dress Up, you get to explore a vibrant underwater world where two playful dolphins are ready to get glammed up! This charming dress-up game lets you choose outfits, accessories, and fun props to create a stylish underwater look for both dolphins.

title: Basketball Rush
description: This isn’t just about shooting — it's about precision, patience and strategy. As you score, the game intensifies, but with helpful power-ups at your disposal, you’ll be ready for anything. Unlock a variety of unique ball skins to customize your game and add even more excitement.

title: Style Icons: 2024 Rewind Edition
description: Relive 2024’s hottest fashion trends in Style Icons: 2024 Rewind Edition! From TikTok-inspired makeup to glamorous red carpet looks, this game brings together the best dress-up challenges of the year! Style iconic outfits, create bold beauty looks, and transform your favorite characters for every occasion—festivals, dates, holidays, and more! Are you ready to be the ultimate fashion trendsetter? Play now and own the style game!

title: Age of Apes Run
description: Welcome to the wildest adventure of the ape era! Age of Apes Run is a fun platform running game. It is full of puzzles and nervous battles. Perfect for every arcade-loving boy out there! You'll be a brave ape warrior and run through a platform full of obstacles! Collect many bananas to boost your skills.

title: Obby: Gym Simulator, Escape
description:
Help Obby build up his muscles to escape from the castle!
Swing and get bigger!

The game has a rank system.
Defeat bosses, compete with other players for the first place in the ranking!

Spend cups on eggs, collect all the pets.
They will help you swing much faster.

It's up to you to press a barbell, carry weights or lift dumbbells.

title: Hidden Object: My Hotel
description: Hidden Objects: My Hotel – A fun hidden-object game where you help a young woman restore her dream hotel! After buying the old building, she needs your help to clean up cluttered rooms, find hidden items, and bring back its lost charm.

title: BAT!zo Runner
description: Become the cutest vampuuurrr bat! Fly, dodge, and collect mysterious red potions in BAT!zo - new addictive endless runner!

title: Noob: Skyblock Survival
description:
Welcome to the game Noob: Skyblock Survival!

Noob: Skyblock Survival is a sandbox survival game on an island in the style of Minecraft, where you need to dig blocks.

Features of the game:
- Dig blocks
- Plant trees and wheat
- Survive on a cube island
- Expand your island, and then fight zombies!

Remember, you are a cool cube digger and you must survive!

If you liked our game "Noob: Skyblock Survival", then rate it and write a review, and also play our other games about Noob.

title: Bubble Ball
description: Bubble Ball is an untimed bubble-popping strategy game with a classic interface and arcade special effects noises. The player uses an arrow shooter to pop clusters of three or more matching bubbles to earn points and special gifts.

title: Bank Boom Tung Tung Sahur
description: Are you ready for a bank heist? You have 20 seconds to crack the safe! Compete with your friend — the first to open the vault wins. Smash the safe open and beat your friend to it. Hit your friend with a club to slow them down and win the race. The club is a powerful weapon. The fate of the game is in your hands. Strike fast and unlock the bank vault!

title: Hidden Objects Crime Scene
description:
Keep clear! It's a police crime scene, and the evidence must not be disturbed. Engage your detective instincts and dive into Hidden Objects Crime Scene!
 
Keep a sharp eye out for clues left behind by the perpetrator. Work fast, and you might solve the case!

Can you find all the pieces of evidence? Come play now, and let's find out!

title: Ball Dunk Fall
description: In Ball Dunk Fall, your challenge is to guide a constantly falling ball through hoops of varying difficulties by tapping the screen. Test your precision and reflexes as you navigate through tricky obstacles. With each successful dunk, experience the thrill of victory and aim for high scores!

title: Airport Controller
description: Take control in Airport Controller Game! Manage planes, guide safe landings, refuel, repair, and board passengers while handling growing airport traffic. Test your skills in this fast-paced simulation and keep everything running smoothly. Play now!

title: Hide And Seek Blue Monster
description: Enter a world full of mystery and fun. In Hide And Seek: Blue Monster, you will experience a unique hide-and-seek adventure. The game combines casual games with puzzle challenges. You should keep running away to prevent being caught by the blue monster, and when the blue monster is staring at you, hold stop in front of the fruit, in front of the coke, or front of the water glass, etc.

title: Stick Boy: Bazooka Ragdoll
description: Unleash chaos in Stick Boy: Bazooka War! Blast through levels with a variety of powerful bazookas, each with unique abilities. Obliterate enemies, destroy bases, and demolish everything in your path. Choose the perfect ammo to send ragdoll foes flying and experience thrilling destruction as you crush their strongholds. Help Stick Boy annihilate all adversaries and conquer every level in this explosive adventure!

title: Challenger City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Fierce Battle Breakout
description:
This is a fast-paced 3D mini-game that combines survival, combat and strategy. Players will play the role of survivors striving for survival. Facing the threats from enemies, the pursuit of hostile forces and the harsh environment, they will embark on a thrilling journey of survival and defense.
The difficulty of the levels will keep increasing. Each level has a large number of enemies constantly swarming towards the players. Players need to eliminate all the enemies to win.

title: Metal Bay Top Blade Power
description:
Metal Bay Top Blade Power is a top-down action game inspired by spinning blade battles.

Control a powerful metal top blade and fight against enemies in the Metal Bay arena, using real-time physics-based collisions and spin power mechanics.

Master speed, impact force, and rotation control to understand when to attack, collide, or evade.

title: Knit Bears
description: Knit Bears is a cozy and colorful puzzle game where you help adorable teddy bears come to life by knitting them from soft yarn. Choose a bear, place it in the center, and matching yarn balls will start wrapping it up. Each teddy bear needs three yarns to be fully knitted, so plan your moves carefully. If the board fills with unfinished bears that can’t be completed, the game ends.

title: Ultra Realistic BlockCraft
description: Help Steve in the ultra-realistic block world and make sure he reaches the portal. Remember, this realistic world is extremely challenging and monsters are roaming everywhere. You must collect all the diamonds. While collecting diamonds, don’t forget to open the chests you find along the way. Open the chests and crush all the monsters. Reach the portal at the end of the level safely to complete the stage. Remember, you only have one life and if it runs out you will lose everything you’ve earned.

title: Bottle challenge
description: This is a puzzle game, the game provides different volumes of the kettle, according to the game level prompts each kettle needs a different magnitude, to reach the required magnitude of the prompt can be cleared

title: Two RX7 Drifters
description: Drift through 3 stunning drift tracks and show how well you can steer the wheels of a powerful rx7. Go head to head with your friend in a drift battle and see whose a better drift racer, customize your ride with stunning body colors, underglows and cool rims. Are you ready to showcase your drifting skills?

title: Hexa puzzle
description:
Stretch your mind and train your brain with this addictive block puzzle game. Can you solve all of the hundreds of free puzzles?

Put your mind and brain to work to solve the puzzle game by placing the unique hexagon pieces neatly into the puzzle grid. Merge each hexo shaped piece into the grid one by one. Similar to Tetris, they all need to fit together to complete the puzzle. You may need more time to match all the blocks into the super perfect spot - but that's fine, there are no time limit!

title: Blob Hero
description: In Blob Hero, you become a brave hero facing endless waves of enemies and monsters! This survival game offers a true rogue adventure experience. You control a blob hero, choose basic skills and upgrade to survive.

title: Quiz Master
description:
Quiz Master is a fast-paced casual quiz game where you race against the clock—and other players—to prove you’ve got the wittiest brain in town.
Each match drops you into a question showdown spanning everything from pop culture and geography to brain-rot challenges.
When you answer a question correct you get 1 Block that will save you. If you pick the wrong answer you will stay where you are.
The water rises so make sure to answer correctly or you get eaten by the sharks.

title: BouncePop Quest
description: Guide Jumpo, a squishy and color-changing jelly creature, through over 150 vibrant levels filled with tricky obstacles, moving platforms, and environmental hazards. Charge and release powerful jumps to collect stars, dodge enemies, and unlock new worlds—from the icy peaks to fiery lava lands. Master timing, aim for achievements, and power up in this cute, bouncy adventure!

title: Car Park Simulator
description: Welcome to Car Park Simulator, Are you ready to test your driving skills and master the art of parking? Navigate through 72 challenging levels filled with obstacles and narrow spaces...

title: Wordler
description:
It's the same English word guessing game as Hackman I played when I was young.
You are given six chances to guess a word that consists of only five letters.
How many times can you get it right?

title: Unicorn Find The Differences
description: Unicorn Find The Differences is a magical spot-the-difference game designed to test your observation skills and bring a bit of fantasy into your day! Each level offers beautifully crafted images with subtle differences that make every game exciting and engaging. Perfect for both kids and adults, this game is a delightful way to relax, challenge your attention to detail, and enjoy charming unicorn illustrations. See if you can spot all the differences and reach the next level of mythical fun!

title: Twisted Rope
description: Get ready for a mind-bending challenge! ? Twisted Rope Puzzle 3D is a captivating game that will put your problem-solving skills to the test. Dive into a colorful world of tangled ropes and work your way through increasingly complex puzzles.

title: Only Up Balls
description: An exciting journey begins as you try to reach the top! The aim of the Only Up Balls game is to get your ball to the roof of various platforms by jumping from the tracks. The game first starts with the "Noob" sections and allows you to learn the mechanics. Then prove your mastery level with the "Pro" and "Hacker" sections. Finally, push the limits with the "Extreme" section!

title: Jewel Solitaire TriPeaks
description: Rebuild glorious castles in a magical Solitaire adventure! Conquer 200 levels, master 12 variants – from Klondike to Spider – and enjoy fresh mechanics that reinvent the classic. The kingdom’s fate lies in your cards – are you ready to play your way to glory?

title: Idle Bank
description: Idle Bank is not merely a management game but also a simulation game. With 3D stickman characters in a bank, you can control the manager to develop a bank. First, you can use the starting money to unlock a basic Reception to absorb customers. When people come into the bank and save their money here, you can take away them to unlock new facilities and hire assistants. Don't forget to upgrade your character for better capacity ability and higher speed.

title: Magic Kingdom. Hex Match
description: Magic Kingdom: Hex Match is a game where you are the third son of a great king, sent to a distant land to prove your worth. Collect six vital resources—food, water, stone, wood, workers, and metal—to construct new buildings. Unlock all structures and create a stunning, magical kingdom!

title: Qube 2048
description: We present a unique arcade game that combines the dynamic gameplay of Q*bert and the mechanics of 2048!  You start with the number 2 and move across a grid of blocks, doubling its value. The goal is to reach the maximum number by planning your moves and avoiding obstacles.

title: School simulator: My school
description:
Welcome to School Simulator: My School! In this game you need to manage your school, open new classrooms, toilets, canteen, hire staff and help students to learn.
The more classes, the more schoolchildren. The more schoolchildren, the more money. The more money, the more opportunities to develop the school.

title: Obby Climb Racing
description: In the adventure game Obby Climb Racing, players may spend a lot of time racing on insane roads, acquiring interesting skins, improving Obby's bike, and completing difficult parkour courses. For fans of fast-paced, skill-based games, this is a must-play because of the thrilling combination of racing, platforming, and character advancement. In this adrenaline-pumping game, you'll have to crank your engines, level up your character, and complete parkour tasks.

title: Animal Link
description: Animal Link is a puzzle game, the goal is to remove all the squares by eliminating the same pattern. The rules of the game are simple and require a certain amount of observation and quick reaction ability.

title: Catch a Fish Obby
description: Catch a Fish Obby is a chaotic collector raider set in a bright obby world full of Fish and Brainrot Fish characters. Build a money making base with your favorite sea creatures, sneak into rival bases to steal their fish, and protect your own tank from greedy bots and other players.

title: Super Tank Hero
description: Super Tank Hero is an action shooting game. You can drive a tank to shoot and fight on the battlefield, usually facing seven enemies and obstacles. You need to collect soldiers before the battle, they'll join your team and help you fight. You can also find energy and Life on the battlefield to increase your speed or power. When you are able to fight, follow the instructions to find your opponent and fire at him until you beat him.

title: Survival in Area 51
description: You will play as the character Stas, who works in Area 51. One day, Stas was given a strange task, to find acid and pour it into an unusual device. Then something terrible happened... In Area 51, an explosion occurred underground, and zombies appeared. They began to attack scientists and guards. Your task is to destroy zombies, mercenaries and find a way out of this terrible underground place. The game offers shooting, simple puzzles, a plot, many locations and a final battle.

title: Hill Racing - Egg drop!
description:
Press down to accelerate your car. Go as fast as you can carrying an egg while collection coins. 

Upgrade your cars and levels with coins.

title: Queen of Mahjong
description:
Plunge into the atmosphere of a magical world in a new game in the style of Mahjong Connect. Discover several worlds of objects by finding identical pairs of different items!

Queen of Mahjong is an amazing game that will give you moments of pleasure.

title: Christmas Snowball Arena
description: Christmas Snowball Arena is a 3D stickman snowball IO game. You have to compete with nine other players in collecting snow blocks and making your snowball bigger. The goal is to be the last player standing by defeating and collecting other snowballs. You can also collect blank snowballs that are free for anyone. You can use two power-ups in the game to boost your snowball: one that makes it twice as big and another that makes it twice as fast. If you are looking for some snowball action, try it!

title: Pixel Flow
description: Come to train your brain with colors and paths. Pixel Flow is a clean and addictive pixel puzzle game that challenges your logic and planning skills. In each level, you must send kittens of different colors into the track. Pixel points matching the kittens' colors will be eliminated. Paths cannot cross or overlap, so every move matters.

title: Mickey Run Adventure Game
description:
Welcome to the great kingdom craft! prepare yourself brave mickey, get ready to run, jump, dash and rush through the kingdom.
In this craft game, you will be a runner who has to run and collect coins in an endless runner game mine. You need to be very careful as there will be many mouse in your way. You will need to use your craft Mickey and reflexes to avoid them and keep running. There will also be power-ups that you can collect to help you in the craft game.

title: Duck Luck
description:
Guide a lovable duck and his humorous friend and drop numbered blocks that merge when identical numbers come into contact, creating larger numbers that help clear the board. 
As you strategize and match numbers, you'll earn points. 
The goal is to accumulate the highest score possible by making as big of a number as you can.

title: Money Chaser- City Parkour Game
description:
Chasing/Running eldnlessly for collecting coins(Money).
Try to avoid traps & *kick out all the enemy/competitors on your way.
*You can kick out enemy infront of you with slide skill*

After you have enough money, you can challenge the Boss fight.
The amount of coins(Money Bullets) is the only weapon to defeat Boss, the more the better.

Remember, no money no life...just keep running :)

title: Backgammon Duel
description:
One of the oldest, most played and loved games, the classic backgammon game. 

Also known as Tavli (Greece), Tawla (Egypt), and Takteh (Iranian), but whatever you call it you can download it now and challenge yourself.

title: 2 Player Online Chess
description: Enjoy the classic game of chess with 2 Player Online Chess! Play solo against the computer or challenge a friend in 2-player mode. Easy to use, with no distractions—just simple, fun chess for everyone. Start playing today!

title: Angry Flappy
description: "Angry Flappy is a fast-paced twist on the classic game, where players not only navigate through obstacles but also shoot bullets to destroy enemies and barriers. Get ready for an action-packed flying adventure!"

title: Emoji Match
description: the emoji match includes dozens of different emojis. you can increase or decrease the number of pieces of these puzzles as you wish. so you can make it suitable for all ages. you can have a pleasant time by having fun and exercising your brain. come on we are waiting for you.

title: Atomic Merge 2048
description:
Atomic Merge 2048 is a fast-paced puzzle game where you drop and combine numbered blocks to reach the legendary 2048 tile! Strategically  drop blocks which fall on to center , merge identical numbers, and keep the pile from touching the red orbit. Watch out — one wrong drop could be the end!
Perfect for fans of casual, merge, and puzzle games. How high can you score before the stack overflows?

title: Scala 40
description:
Scala 40 is an Italian card game played with two French decks and jokers.

Players form sets and runs to reach at least 40 points and lay down their first combinations.

Each turn, players draw and discard, trying to optimize their hand and use their own or opponents’ combinations.

The first player to run out of cards wins, while the others add up the points of their remaining cards.

title: Radiant Rush
description: Radiant Rush is a minimalist synthwave drifting game where you control only the car's steering—not its speed. Your goal is to complete increasingly challenging levels while collecting all the datacubes scattered throughout.

title: Checkers
description:
Immerse yourself in classic checkers on the go! 
Enjoy strategic moves, challenging AI, and hot-seat multiplayer fun in this classic checkers game!
Dive into the timeless fun of Checkers! Experience sleek design, smart AI opponent, and thrilling hot-seat multiplayer matches in this classic board game. Master strategy and make every move count!

title: Obby Draw to Escape
description:
Have a blast in Obby illustrating your way to victory! Play the fun and relaxing casual game Draw to Escape and see if you can overcome the levels' issues using just your creativity.

You may earn money as you go through the levels, and you can earn even more coins when you reach the end of each level for every star you find. Things may vanish or explode and kill you, so be sure to check every level thoroughly.

title: Imposter Coloring Book
description: Get ready for a colorful twist on the mystery and excitement of the Imposter Coloring Book! Inspired by the thrilling world of imposters, this coloring app lets you bring your favorite characters to life with vibrant colors and unique brush styles. Choose from various brushes, including pastel, watercolor, and pencil, to add a unique touch to each crewmate, imposter, and spaceship scene. Whether you prefer bold colors or a soft pastel look, every coloring page is yours to make unique.

title: Legend of Dragon Hunt
description:
Legend Of Dragon Hunt is a clicker game. Players control a skeleton hero to eliminate invading monsters, gain resources/skills, and defeat bosses.
Features: light-hearted 2D cartoon style, joystick control, auto-shooting.
Systems: Pet, Player Upgrade, Sign-in, Weapon, Weapon Fusion, Idle.

title: Merry Christmas Connect
description: 《Cute Animal Connect》is a classic puzzle game where you connect identical patterns to eliminate them and score points. It tests your observation skills and reaction speed, with simple yet addictive gameplay that appeals to players of all ages.

title: PoppyTile
description: PoppyTile is a soothing and delightful tile-matching puzzle game set in a peaceful, picturesque countryside farm full of charm!

title: Wednesday Dark Academia
description: With Wednesday Dark Academia, you can choose from various unique and stylish outfits, accessories, and makeup options. Start with her makeup, creating a look that's perfect for school or the ballroom. Play dark lipstick and eyeshadow, and with a little bit of imagination, you can create a look that's all your own. Next, dress her up for a fun day at school, and then see what party look you can put together for her. Style her hair and pick the right accessories for a complete look.

title: STALKER-Strike
description: STALKER-Strike is a tactical online shooter inspired by CS and Valorant — but set in a deadly Zone filled with anomalies. Fight as stalkers or special forces in fast-paced PvP battles where hazards can shift the tide. Level up, survive traps, and prove your skills. Love CS, Standoff, or Valorant? Then step into the Zone and become a legend in this intense fusion of esports action and danger!

title: Roblo X Zombie
description: Get ready for an intense solo survival experience in Zombie Defense Builder! As the last survivor, you must gather supplies, scavenge for collectibles, and build strong defenses to hold off waves of relentless zombies. In this action-packed, strategic game, every second counts. Gather materials, craft powerful barricades, and upgrade your defenses before the next wave hits. Can you survive the apocalypse and fend off the undead for as long as possible

title: Turbo Race
description:
Get ready to burn rubber in Turbo race, the ultimate racing experience of the fastest and most powerful cars in the world. Whether youre a casual gamer or a hardcore racing enthusiast.
Race through a variety of stunning locations, each with its own unique challenges.

title: Geometry Stars
description: Enjoy the Geometry Stars world with a brand new adventure! New levels, new music, new monsters, new everything!. Flex your clicky finger as you jump, fly and flip your way through dark caves and spiky obstacles. Collect many stars as you can to upgrade your famous characters and find the secrets of this Rhythm-based adventure.

title: Mojo Emoji
description: Moji Emoji is a fun and clever word/emoji puzzle game where each level challenges you to guess the hidden word or phrase from a set of expressive emojis. Think fast, connect the clues, and test your emoji decoding skills across hundreds of creative puzzles.

title: Tap To Color: Painting Book
description:
Unleash your inner artist and paint your stress away with Tap to Color: Painting Book Game! Dive into a vibrant world of color where creating a masterpiece is as simple as a single tap. Forget the mess of crayons and paints; this is the ultimate digital coloring book for all ages.

Find your calm and enter a state of flow as you bring beautiful illustrations to life. It’s the perfect way to relax after a long day, pass the time on your commute,

title: Obby Escape: Prison Rat Dance
description: Obby Escape: Prison Rat Dance is an exhilarating adventure game that merges the thrill of intricate prison escape challenges with the dynamic agility required in parkour. Assume the role of a resourceful rat striving to escape the strict surveillance of a heavily fortified prison. Find your way through elaborate mazes and overcome diverse, challenging obstacles as you plot your daring prison escape.

title: Zombie Rodeo Multiplication
description: Don't let your zombie lose his head or other body parts in this Halloween themed multiplication math game. Answer the multiplication problem correctly before time runs out so your zombie doesn't lose a body part. If you answer incorrectly or time runs out before you get the correct answer, a body part falls off of your zombie. Once all of his body parts fall off, the game is over.  See how far you can go and earn coins to get upgrades.  Four difficulty settings to choose from.

title: Ladder Master - Color Run
description:
Run and collect ladder parts, grow your ladder, reach the moon!
Fun and addictive runner game for one player!
Can you make the highest ladder? Check out now!

title: Crazy Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning supercars with crazy speed limits and drive them through 4 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Crazy Traffic Racer!

title: Disk Rush
