description: Disk Rush is a reaction-based arcade game where players must quickly sort colored disks into their matching zones. The game challenges your speed and accuracy as disks appear faster over time. With simple tap mechanics and increasing difficulty, Disk Rush tests your ability to think and act quickly under pressure.

title: Butterfly Kyodai Deluxe 2
description: The beloved classic returns! In Butterfly Kyodai Deluxe 2, connect matching butterflies in this beautifully refreshed game,  featuring new wing colors, enhanced animations, updated UI, and countless levels to complete . Can you clear each level before time runs out? Collect coins to unlock new backgrounds and stunning butterfly wings in the updated shop! A relaxing, fun puzzle for all ages!

title: Merge Car Defense
description:
Prepare to battle wave upon wave of relentless enemies as you skilfully merge and upgrade the defences of your cars.

Build out a roster of cars and use them tactically in order to defeat the enemy, collect coins and be victorious!

title: Hotfoot Baseball
description:
Simple baseball game with fun, cartoony players and easy one-click controls. It’s fast to learn and fun to play!

Unlike other baseball games, the action doesn’t stop after you hit the ball. You need to decide when to run, move to the next base, and try to score runs. It’s all about timing and quick decisions.

Pick one of the best baseball countries and try to win the championship. The game keeps the excitement of baseball but with simple rules, so anyone can enjoy it.

title: Hexa Block: Honey Cells
description: Dive into the exciting world of logic and shapes. Your task is to fill the field with multi-colored hexagonal blocks, choosing the right combinations. Each level is a new puzzle that requires attention, logic and precise calculation. Exciting gameplay, smooth animation and bright graphics make the gameplay as enjoyable as possible.

title: Animal in Rails!
description:
An exciting puzzle game about delivering animals to a trader's base

Connect and disconnect railways around the world to help each animal reach its home.

Install, remove, and redirect connections so that wagons can safely connect to the locomotive. But be careful and don't let them collide with each other!

Delay trains by using railway barriers. Change the tracks to redirect the wagons in different directions. Pick up new pets along the way and face even more challenges along the way!

title: Traffic Jam Hop On
description: In Traffic Jam: Hop On, challenge your strategy thinking and quick reflexes! This wonderful puzzle game will take you into a colorful parking lot. Your task is to help all kinds of vehicles get out of traffic jams and start smoothly.

title: Hidden Objects Story
description: Every scene tells a story, waiting for your discovery. Collect coins, unlock hints and piece together secrets buried beneath the surface. The mystery deepens with every level. Stay focused or the secrets slip away forever.

title: LampHead
description: The main character of this game is an amazing man with a lamp instead of a head who needs to get out of a dark and dangerous strange place at any cost. Are you ready to prove that you have an outstanding reaction, maneuvering between sharp obstacles, collecting bonuses, remembering that at the end of each dark path the light of victory awaits you? We are ready to offer you a one-time runner in which tedious jumps are replaced by moving the main character between two equal planes.

title: Color Dodge
description:
Color Dodge is a fast-paced, addictive color-matching arcade game where reflexes and precision are your only hope!

Control a glowing circle and survive as colorful walls charge toward you from all directions. Here's the twist — you must collide only with the wall segment that matches your color, or you explode in a juicy blast!

Whether you're chasing high scores or just vibing with neon chaos, Color Dodge delivers bite-sized action with a splash of style.

title: Ants Party
description: Welcome to Ants Party — a charming strategy-idle game where your colony's mission is clear: eat it all! On each level, a delicious item appears — from juicy apples to giant cakes — and your ants must devour it completely. Starting from your anthill, they march out, take a bite, and carry the piece back home. The level ends when the entire treat is consumed and hauled away.

title: Shiny Jewels
description: Conquer each level with your logic, unleash powerful boosters and claim victory! Complete missions to earn unique rewards or join special events: break the chest, collect as many coins as possible within limited moves or race against time to complete the level.

title: Ludo Star
description: Enter the arena of strategy and chance! Choose your favorite mode, unlock stylish dice skins and climb the trophy road. Outsmart opponents, master your moves and prove you’ve got what it takes to rule the board and become a Ludo Star.

title: Survival On Raft Multiplayer
description: Begin an exciting survival adventure in Survival On Raft: Multiplayer. Have an addictive survival-adventure simulation on an island. Here, you'll be gathering various foods, stones, and other items. Collect ocean resources like wood, leaves and rare items. Sharks in the sea will attack your raft at any moment.

title: Black Cat Stacking POP
description: Tap tiles to clear them! When you tap a tile, any same-colored tiles next to it will also connect and clear together. Clear a bunch of tiles at once, and a toy mouse will appear to help clear even more! Clear target tiles or tiles that add moves to increase your remaining moves. The game ends when you run out of moves.

title: Space Shift
description: It's a game where you travel in space for as long as possible without hitting any obstacles- meteorites or missiles. Your ship moves automatically and you can slow it down to ensure it doesn't hit anything. There are different galaxies to travel through different in appearance and the type of obstacles to appear. If you travel far enough, you may encounter even an alien ship!

title: Color Race Obby
description: Color Race Obby is an exciting game inspired by Roblox and Obby. Compete with players online on a field of colored blocks. Enter the race and become the champion! Join the fun!

title: Headless Joe
description: While playing, robot Joe literally lost his head. But it's not as hopeless as it seems. To get it back in place and screw it tightly, Joe needs to solve puzzles and collect all the bolts. But he can’t do this without your help!

title: Labubu and Treasures: Fun Adventure
description: Collect bright combinations, pass hundreds of levels together with amazing characters from the Labubu universe! In this exciting Match-3 puzzle you will find bright adventures, interesting puzzles and fluffy magic.

title: Cashier Game
description: You play as a cashier who needs to punch the goods and give change to the customers. As you earn money, you can improve your store and buy new furnishings.

title: Stickman Kombat 2D
description: Adrenaline unleashed! Rage, speed, and chaos collide in explosive 2D battles. Feel every hit — and dive into the madness. Are you ready?

title: Sandbox - Destroy the Ragdoll
description:
Ready to destroy and earn? In this sandbox clicker, it's simple: choose your weapon, attack characters, and get paid for the damage you deal. The stronger your attacks, the bigger the reward!  

Use different tactics, unlock new gear, and upgrade your firepower. The further you go, the more powerful the weapons and the greater the possibilities. Ready to become the strongest fighter? Then tap, destroy, and earn!

title: Tile Adventure
description: A fun and satisfying tile-matching puzzle game! Match tiles in sets of three, clear the board, and enjoy a relaxing, brain-teasing experience. With smooth gameplay, colorful visuals, and levels that gradually increase in challenge, it’s perfect for anyone who loves casual puzzles. (Inspired by the classic Mahjong layout, but with a fresh, modern twist!)

title: BillyTheBox
description:
Want to deep dive into a cute graphics cozy puzzle game? BilBox is for you.

Simple puzzle game which can be enjoyed by anyone who loves playing cozy puzzle games with fun elements.

title: Space Shooter - Speed Typing Challenge
description:
Get ready for an exciting space adventure that helps you improve your typing skills! In this free educational online word game, you'll pilot a spaceship and face waves of enemies.

It's a fun way to boost your typing speed and accuracy. Jump into your spaceship, start typing, and help save the galaxy one word at a time!

Think you're the fastest typist in the galaxy? Prove it! The universe is counting on you - start your adventure now and become the ultimate space hero!

title: Malatang Master Stack Run 3D
description: Ready to feel the hottest and most fun parkour game ever? In Malatang Master Stack Run 3D, you become a street food chef. Keep running through colorful 3D platform tracks and collecting tasty ingredients to build the tallest skewer stack ever. Slide to collect noodles, Chicken thighs, chili, and more as you dash forward.

title: ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang
description: Step into the world of ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang, where you take on the role of an adorable mukbang streamer! Get ready to indulge in delicious food, satisfy your cravings, and share the experience with your viewers in a cozy, interactive livestream. The more you eat and engage, the more you earn!

title: Hexa Sort: Winter Edition
description: Step into a mesmerizing world of winter puzzles with Hexa Sort! More than just a game, it’s a journey into a frosty realm where every hexagonal tile sparkles like a snowflake. Match and merge the pieces to create perfect combinations, clearing the way for new challenges as snow crystals gently dissolve.

title: Daring Jack
description:
Jack, an adventurer, was flying over the sea in his small aircraft. When he reached a jungle island, his aircraft's engine failed and he lost control. He escaped from the crashing aircraft, landed safely on the island, and now must find a boat to leave.

He knows of the old boathouse on the island but is uncertain how to reach it. Guide him through the jungle to the boathouse. Help him gather items for survival, focusing on securing food and shelter while navigating the challenging terrain.

title: SnakeMaxx
description: Dive into thrilling PvP battles or solo runs! Unlock avatars, skins, and boosters to power up your snake in this fast-paced action runner.

title: Love Archer
description: Welcome to "Love Archer" - an addictive game where you, as the cheerful Cupid, use your archery skills to bring together all the lovers! Solve puzzles, throw arrows at creatures, and they will find themselves in a magical garden, possessed by love. Are you ready, little hero? Shoot arrows of love to create different loving couples. Even an orc and a human can become happy parents. Combine them and watch love win!

title: Antistress - Simulator Of Sequins DIY
description: ASMR sequin simulator game offers a realistic stress relief experience. Immerse yourself in the world of sequins, where every touch feels real and sensory. The antistress simulator will allow you to relax while enjoying the visual and tactile effects.

title: Hit ball
description:
Hit ball is a fast-paced arcade game with roguelike elements, in which you fight off waves of enemies with ricocheting balls! With each shot you break through obstacles, knock down monsters and earn experience to improve your abilities.
Dozens of levels with unique traps, walls, boosting balls and dangerous bosses await you. Collect boosters, pick up abilities, regenerate health and strategize to survive the battle!

title: Obby Rescue Mission
description: Obby rescue mission is a free online game, a set of missions and levels of this game will test your ability to aim and shoot in fast motion to eliminate all the targets in each level. Little Obby is on a rescue mission of citizens captured by a gang of gangsters in the city and your goal is to rescue and eliminate all these enemies that are in your way.

title: Mahjong Zen Garden
description:
Do you like relaxing games? Or do you prefer a challenge? Try Mahjong Zen Garden and choose the way you want to play!

*Hone your attention to detail and planning skills in this classic Chinese puzzle game by choosing the best mode for you.
*120 unique campaign levels!
*Show your skills and unlock Endless Mode!
*Unique design with an Eastern atmosphere!

title: Mahjong Lines
description: Mahjong Lines is a relaxing logic puzzle in the mahjong connect style. Find matching tile pairs and clear the board by linking them with a valid path. With classic mahjong tiles, simple rules, hints, and lots of levels, it’s perfect for both quick sessions and thoughtful puzzle-solving.

title: Merge Master
description: A casual mobile game centered around matching and elimination. The game features vibrant colors, coupled with a visual style rich in beach elements. With background music and sound effects reminiscent of leisurely walks along the beach, it creates a relaxed beach-strolling environment that immerses players in an auditory experience.

title: Hidden Object: Street Of Secrets
description: Hidden Objects: Street of Secrets is an atmospheric hidden object game where you become the lead detective. A mysterious case awaits, and your insightful assistant is there to help, offering hints and guiding you to crucial details.

title: Golf Mini
description: Golf Mini is a fun and addictive game in which your goal is to get the ball to the hole in the minimum number of strokes. Complete levels, each of which is a unique golf course with various obstacles and traps.

title: Earth Defender
description:
Earth Defender is a fast-paced arcade game where you control a spaceship orbiting around planet Earth. Deadly meteors are flying toward the planet, and it's your mission to stop them before they crash into Earth.

Your ship circles the planet. Time your moves carefully and collide with incoming meteors to destroy them

Tap to change your orbit direction and intercept as many meteors as possible. Survive the meteor storm and defend Earth for as long as you can!

title: Block Blast 2048
description: Block Blast 2048 is a fun and addictive puzzle game where you merge blocks with the same number to create higher values. Keep merging to boost your score and face increasing challenges. How far can you go? Can you reach the ultimate block? Play now and test your puzzle skills!

title: Color Dots Challenge
description: Dive into Color Dots Challenge, a bright and addictive puzzle game that puts your logic and strategy to the test. Connect, match, and move colorful dots to clear the board and score big! Simple to play yet hard to master, this free online game is perfect for quick breaks or long sessions on your phone or computer. Can you outsmart the colors and conquer every level?

title: Brainrots Lava Survive Online
description: Brainrots Lava Survive Online is an intense survival experience where rising lava transforms the map into a dangerous obstacle zone. Players must collect brainrots in risky areas and escape before the lava blocks safe routes. Online mode is available in 1 Player, allowing chat and interaction, while 2 Player mode offers local shared-screen competition. With more than 60 characters in normal, gold, diamond, Celestial, and time-limited Divine tiers, progression stays dynamic.

title: Avenger Guard
description: Dark forces have destroyed your homeland—rise as the Avenger Guard! Merge heroes to unlock power, fortify defenses, and take vengeance. Lead your legendary squad to repel waves of enemies, upgrade through fusion, and reclaim what’s yours. Will you be the last line of defense?

title: Mojicon Winter Connect
description:
The Mojicon series returns for the holidays! Match festive tiles, break the new Ice Sheet blockers, and enjoy a relaxing winter puzzle adventure. ❄️
Mojicon Winter Connect takes the classic Onet matching fun you love and covers it in a layer of fresh snow. Immerse yourself in a cozy holiday atmosphere, connecting festive icons like reindeer, gingerbread men, and happy snowmen.
Fast, satisfying, and full of seasonal charm – it’s the perfect winter puzzle for all ages. ✨✨✨

title: Roof Car Stunt
description: Challenging car game where you drive and collect coins. Jump around ramps, drive through various obstacles and drive into a giant pink donut to complete the level!

title: Princess vs Shark
description:
Dive into a magical underwater world with “Princess vs Shark”!
Game Features:
	•	Engaging Gameplay: Solve puzzles, guide water flows, and help the princess overcome obstacles.
	•	Beautiful Graphics: Immerse yourself in the enchanting underwater world.
	•	Challenging Levels: Each level gets harder and more thrilling!
	•	Easy Controls: Simple and intuitive controls make it accessible for everyone.

title: Flick Baseball Super Homerun
description:
Experience various baseball pitches based on the pendulum movement. The ball will fly further if you can hit the ball directly with the quick flick. Experience a “real-life like” batting simulation in this baseball game.
# One Flick Easy Control
You only use flick to control the batting for this game. The more accurate you flick your finger to hit the ball; it is more likely that you will be a home-run hitter.

title: Exit - Puzzle
description: Embark on an exciting journey in Exit - Puzzle, a captivating game where your mission is to rotate the puzzle and guide the ball to the exit! Each level presents new challenges, requiring you to think creatively and find the best route. Twist and turn the puzzle to navigate through obstacles and unlock the path forward. With a variety of levels and progressively harder puzzles, this game will keep you entertained and engaged.

title: Paint Pop 3D
description:
Paint Pop 3D is an one-tap hyper casual shooting game that will keep you hooked for hours!

Tap to paint. Hold for more fun!
Stay away from obstacles and paint all slices on the ring.

Features:
- More than 1000+ levels to experience game play.
- A lot challenging missions.
- Various characters & themes.
- Beautiful graphic.

title: Billiards 3D: Russian Pyramid
description: Play a realistic online billiards game against virtual opponents of varying difficulty. Customize AI skill levels to match your ability and improve your game. Enjoy lifelike tables of different sizes and refine your strategy in this immersive billiards experience!

title: Block Escape
description: Block Escape is a brain-teasing puzzle game where players clear blocks by moving them off the screen in the direction shown by the arrows on each block. Each level requires logical thinking and careful planning, as blocks can only move in specific directions, making every puzzle increasingly challenging and strategic.

title: Skip Love
description: Ready for a funny, brain-teasing love adventure? Play an addictive brain teaser puzzle game in Skip Love. A funny little stickman hero trying to win the heart of his beloved while dodging all sorts of dangers! Each level has unique puzzles that make you think and laugh! Think and use your brain to overcome each challenge, helping the man overcome his sexy wife and lover. For example, help him disguise himself as a clown, disrupt, create chaos, etc.

title: Squid Game Memory Card Match
description:
Step into the thrilling world of Squid Game Memory Card Match! Test your memory and focus as you uncover pairs of iconic Squid Game symbols and characters. Can you keep your cool under pressure and match all the cards before time runs out?
Challenge yourself or compete with friends to see who can master the ultimate memory test. With Squid Game Memory Card Match, every flip brings you closer to victory or defeat – can you handle the pressure?

title: Press "A" to Party
description: Press A to Party is a casual arcade game collection designed for players of all ages. Gather your friends and family, settle onto the couch, and dive into the action with simple one-button controls and fast-paced gameplay. Compete against up to 4 players on the same screen, vying for the coveted title of the ultimate arcade champion. Get ready for a blast of fun and excitement at your next gathering!

title: 100 Doors Challenge
description:
Do you like puzzles and hidden object games? Do you play games from the 100 Doors series? Then this point-and-click game is just what you need! Use all your skills to complete all levels and get all achievements.
The main goal in the "100 Doors Challenge" is to get out of the room. Using all the capabilities of the device, you need to open each of the 100 doors and move the elevator to the next floor. Find hidden objects, solve puzzles and use objects to do it!

title: Loop Ghost
description: Time loop puzzle: ghosts of your past cycles automatically repeat your moves. Use them to press buttons, open passages, and escape together.

title: Color Block Blast 3
description:
Drag and drop the correct block into the grid. Match 3 or more tiles of the same colour to eliminate them.

Score beautiful combos while earning bonus points and watching beautiful animations take shape.

How high can you score in this endless match 3 game?

title: Christmas Find The Differences
description: Get into the festive spirit with Christmas Find The Differences, the ultimate holiday-themed puzzle game! Test your observation skills as you compare two seemingly identical pictures filled with Christmas cheer. Spot all the differences in magical settings featuring Christmas trees, snowy landscapes, stockings, and Santa himself!

title: Wacky Strike
description:
This time you will choose who are you actually. Well, no. Who is the strongest! Girls, or boys! So, just build a lot of towers, and buy your cool enemy! Fight like the real hero and you will cope with it, just try it!

Are you a good fighter? Then this game is for you! Just pick a side, setup your troops, and fight against your mortal enemy, do you think that it is so easy?! Then march from your castle to the enemy castle claiming ground in between.

title: Break the block there, Brainrot!
description:
Break the block there, Brainrot! — Break blocks and collect the entire Brainrot collection.
Sell Brainrots to earn points to upgrade your axe.
Find rare Brainrots in blocks. The further you go to collect the blocks, the greater the reward, but beware of the block guard.

title: Bank Robbery 3
description:
It is time for a new robbery!
Your new target is the most secure bank in the city.
According to the inside data, the bank is equipped with the newest automated anti-robbery technologies, which makes this robbery a tough one.
But it shouldn’t be much of a problem for a professional like you.
And as always, if you succeed, a big payday awaits you.
Come on, let’s do it!

title: Cyberpunk Agent
description:
Cyberpunk Agent is the most challenging shooting game available full of thrilling missions.
Get ready to enjoy this action packed eye popping game.
Your arena is attacked by scary zombies.
They want to eat civilians. They are planning the dangerous missions to harm the innocents.
Its time to save your people and kill all zombies.
Use your best assassin skills and fight with these scary zombies.

title: Guess Word
description: Guess Word is a free online puzzle and word game for boys played on PuzzleGame. It's easy to play. You have six chances to guess words. The letter you guessed will change color to give you a hint. This tests your vocabulary. The game is simple and very suitable for players of all ages. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable! We have three modes for you. Challenge yourself!

title: Jigsort Puzzles
description: Jigsort Puzzle is an app that is art puzzle and lets you complete jigsaw puzzle game for free! Various difficulty levels for casual and experiences puzzlers!

title: Capybara Xmas Merge
description:
Capybara Xmas Merge is a cute and cozy holiday game where you combine adorable Christmas capybaras!
Drop festive capybaras into the box, watch them roll and bump into each other, and merge into bigger, funnier holiday characters.
Create giant capybaras, score points, and enjoy the warm winter atmosphere.

title: Dogs vs Aliens
description: Your favorite pets have been kidnapped by evil aliens! Hurry to save them and punish the alien bullies. Evolve to defeat stronger enemies, free new dogs, get unique resources so that your dogs can evolve! Collect all the dog breeds and see how cool they will be! Discover new territories, visit the beach, park, city square and forest!

title: Flag Puzzle Jam: Collect Flags
description: Immerse yourself in Flag Jam, a unique blend of puzzle-solving, flags collecting, and visual ASMR effects! Tap to match banner pieces, watch them glide smoothly into place, and clear the board as you complete each flag. With easy-to-learn mechanics and stunning visual effects, Flag Jam is the perfect game to help you unwind.

title: Ink Inc Tattoo
description: Ink Inc Tattoo is a free online simulation game for boys played on PuzzleGame. In the game, you can experience the satisfaction of a tattoo artist drawing various artistic tattoos for clients. You need to draw the correct lines and colors to complete the image given by the customer. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Come and get a new entertainment experience.

title: The Earth Evolution
description: The Earth: Evolution is a relaxing placement game. What does your fantasy planet look like? You can use beautiful objects to decorate and build your unique planet in different areas of the universe. Collect sunlight by placing buildings and when you have enough sunlight, you get more resources needed to build your planet. Escape from the stressful daily life for a few minutes or even longer!

title: Spellmind
description:
Welcome to Spellmind Magic School where wonderful adventures await! Solve match-3 puzzles to restore the old mansion to former glory. Beat colorful levels, explore magic mist-filled rooms, decorate them to your taste and solve the mysteries of the missing wizard’s mansion!
Show that you’ve got what it takes to restore the Spellmind Magic School to its former glory!  Build wonderful interiors for Sabrina’s story to take place in.

title: Celebrity Wednesday Addams Style
description: Indulge in the iconic and bewitching Celebrity Wednesday Addams Style! Embrace the darkly chic aesthetics, explore mesmerizing outfits, and channel your inner gothic elegance. Discover how celebrities rock the macabre charm of Wednesday Addams with a modern twist. Unleash your inner darkness and redefine elegance with a touch of the mysterious.

title: Space Cleaner
description:
Space Cleaner is a casual space arcade game where you clear dangerous asteroid fields around your spacecraft. Use your mouse to destroy nearby asteroids, earn money, and survive as long as your fuel lasts.

When your fuel runs out, upgrade your ship’s abilities and return to space to continue cleaning the asteroid field. Destroy every asteroid to complete the stage and unlock the next challenge.

title: Zombie Monster Survivors
description: Zombie Monster Survivors is a role-playing game where you will become a brave survivor. Fight against terrifying zombies and monsters in an amazing world. Use your resources wisely and defeat the monsters and zombies that keep coming. Try to survive in this extreme environment. Keep moving and attack large waves of zombies. Collect coins or energy and choose your skills.

title: Bubble Up
description:
Help BUB, a tiny bubble, fulfill its dream of reaching the blazing sun. Use his bubble friends, BLE, to push BUB past obstacles, rise from the ground to towering buildings, and conquer the skies!

You only need to shoot out BLE by click left mouse, good luck!

title: Xmas Hexa Sort
description:
Xmas Hexa Sort is a festive twist on the classic hexagon puzzle!
Move and place colorful stacks of blocks on the board to create perfect combinations and clear space. Relax, think ahead, and enjoy the cozy holiday atmosphere as you solve each cheerful puzzle!

title: The Prism City Detectives
description: Embark on a vibrant adventure with "The Prism City Detectives" and join Luna, Ruby, Skye, Willow, Daisy, Violet, and Lumi in restoring color to their monochrome city! Explore dazzling dress-up levels and unravel hidden objects mysteries to find the missing Rainbow Gem and bring back the hues of unity.

title: Dessert DIY
description: Step into a sweet little food studio and craft desserts for hungry customers! Follow simple step-by-step recipes, pick the right ingredients, and assemble tasty treats exactly as requested. Satisfy each guest to earn coins, then spend your rewards in the shop to unlock more items, upgrades, and delicious options. Easy to learn, relaxing to play, and full of colorful desserts!

title: Bullet Heroes
description:
Join the ultimate team-based shooting game! Team up with players worldwide to strategize, outsmart, and dominate your enemies. Experience intense firefights on stunning high-definition 3D maps, with multiple game modes and a vast arsenal of weapons. Become an elite agent, master your skills, and lead your team to victory.
Dive into the action and enjoy the thrill of cooperative gameplay. 
Are you ready to become a hero?

title: Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle
description: Dive into the relaxing world of Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle! Your goal is simple: sort the colored liquids into the flasks until each flask contains only one color. With over 1000 levels and unique modes like Color Fusion, Mystery, and Time Trial, this puzzle game will test your logic and patience. Unlock new themes and achievements as you play!

title: Pull the Pin: Fish Rescue!
description: Pull the Pin: Fish Rescue! is a relaxing and addictive puzzle game with lots of interesting puzzles. You will see several niches in it. They will be separated by partitions. In one niche you will see a fish, and in another water. You will need to carefully study everything and pull the pin. Thus, you will open it and water will get to the fish.

title: Hexa Sort Trick or Treat
description: Step into a haunted puzzle realm where glowing hexagonal blocks hide within a web of spooky challenges. Your task: sort eerie, color-coded pieces into their rightful places before the shadows close in. With every drag and drop, you’ll sharpen your wits and unravel chillingly clever layouts that grow trickier as you progress. Easy to pick up yet devilishly addictive, this Halloween brain-teaser will keep players of all ages spellbound through hundreds of spooky levels.

title: Real Car Parking And Stunt
description: Welcome to Real Car Parking And Stunt, a challenging driving simulation game. Here you’ll control a car and put your parking and stunt skills to the test. Choose stunt mode or parking mode, each level challenges you to park your car accurately while performing exciting stunts.

title: Celebrities Get Ready For Christmas
description: Step into the world of ‘Celebrities Get Ready for Christmas’! Join your favorite stars as they prepare for the festive season. Explore dazzling holiday outfits, glamorous decorations, and witness the magic of Christmas through the eyes of celebrities. Get ready for a star-studded holiday celebration! Play and have fun!

title: Bouncy Blob Race: Obstacle Course
description: Bouncy Blob Race: Obstacle Course is an exciting physics-based racing game. Guide a bouncy blob through challenging obstacles with just one click. The blob will move in the opposite direction of the thrust. Maneuver through the course and beat your opponent to the finish line. Grab power-ups for an extra boost and secure victory in this thrilling race!

title: Ellie And Friends Art Bloom Aesthetic
description: Ellie And Friends Art Bloom Aesthetic is all about exploring creativity through unique fashion and art! Dress them up in colorful outfits, mix and match funky accessories, and dive into the world of artistic expression. From painting and drawing to choosing the perfect look, this game lets you celebrate individuality and artistic flair with Ellie and her friends. Get ready to unleash your inner artist!

title: Offroad Island
description: "Offroad Island" is an exciting racing game where you compete with different vehicles, earn money by completing missions, and customize your vehicles by upgrading them. Each map offers an adventure full of challenges. Are you ready for a journey full of speed and excitement?

title: Hide Ball
description: Hide Ball is an addictive puzzle game where your mission is to protect the red ball from dangerous spiky enemies. Use the given blocks to build a safe shelter and hide the ball. Each level brings a new challenge — the constructions become trickier, and the enemies more relentless. Plan your moves, create a solid defense, and save your little hero!

title: Butterfly Match Mastery
description:
Plunge into the atmosphere of a magical forest in a new game in the style of Mahjong Connect. Free the butterflies by finding identical pairs of wings!

Butterfly Match Mastery is an amazing game that will give you moments of pleasure. Free butterflies in an enchanted magical forest by connecting pairs of identical wings and enjoy their flight! But don't forget about the time, when it runs out - you will lose.

title: Dream Kitchen
description: Dream Kitchen is a fun and fast-paced restaurant simulation game inspired by shawarma-style cooking gameplay. Take customer orders, cook the right food, and serve every dish on time to keep customers happy. Complete levels with 3-star ratings, earn coins, upgrade your kitchen equipment, and unlock new recipes. Explore multiple themed chapters, including a Pancake Shop, Street Stall, Fast Food Restaurant, and Western Restaurant, each with unique dishes and challenges!

title: Arrow Slide Puzzle
description:
Arrow Slide Puzzle — Logic Puzzle Game
Arrow Slide Puzzle is a clean and engaging logic puzzle game where you slide arrows across the board to clear the field and reveal a hidden picture. Simple rules turn into deep challenges that test your logic, planning, and spatial thinking. Perfect for fans of arrow puzzles, sliding logic games, and relaxing brain teasers.

? Download now and start solving today!

title: Frogtastic Marble Adventure
description:
Get ready to dive into a world of colors and adrenaline with Frogtastic, the puzzle game that will keep you glued to the screen! Jump into the adventure and save your world from the invasion of colorful spheres by combining strategy and lightning-fast reflexes!

Endless fun! Whether you have a few minutes for a quick game or want to dive into long gaming sessions, Frogtastic is perfect for you.

Play now and experience a puzzle game you won’t forget!

title: ASMR Washing & Fixing
description: This game is one of the cleaning games that gives you a real experience like no other. Most of the cleaning and organizing games on the market are 2D, but this game brings you a 3D experience. At the beginning of the game, you can pick a cool tool. There are 5 levels in this game and you can pick a level to start your cleaning. You can move your position as well as use the cleaning tool by clicking on the buttons on the screen or by hitting the keyboard.

title: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park
description: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park is a horror escape adventure where bright amusement park rides hide lurking dangers. Players must solve puzzles, collect items, and uncover clues while evading hostile enemies. Stealth and timing are crucial—explore cautiously, hide when needed, and outsmart the threats to survive and escape. The mix of colorful setting and eerie tension creates a unique, suspenseful experience.

title: Let The Train Go
description: Unblock Metro is a fascinating puzzle game. You need to move all the vehicles in front of the metro so that the metro drives smoothly along the track. You have to be careful that the head of the vehicle is facing that way and you can't change the direction of the vehicle. There are cars,trucks, ambulances, and so on. Lovely pictures and a wide variety of cars give you a refreshing gaming experience. The intricate vehicles placed in front of the metro will dazzle you. Waiting for your challenge！

title: Stickhole.io
description: "Stickhole.io" is a thrilling game with single and two-player modes. In single player, swallow stickman and defeat bosses within time limits. In two-player mode, compete to eat the most stickman, then battle with collected characters. Dynamic gameplay and colorful graphics make it addictive and fun.

title: Walkers Attack
description: Walkers Attack is an action-adventure game. The end of the world is coming, make your way through a world full of danger and survive! Experience non-stop action with auto-fire and strategic movement. Gather resources, defeat hordes of zombies, and complete missions to unlock new themed levels ranging from sci-fi to medieval and urban. As the levels increase, so does the challenge. Are you ready to embark on a survival adventure? Can you be humanity's last hope? Good luck!

title: Traffic Cop 3D
description: Traffic Cop 3D is a casual game where you play as a police officer enforcing the law of the road. Scan nearby drivers and use intel from the police database to decide whether you should pull them over, or let them go, all while progressing through the story and increasing your duties as a cop.

title: Crazy Stunts 3D
description: Get behind the wheel and conquer extreme tracks! Jump from ramps, compete with players, complete modes and unlock new cars!

title: Fill One Line
description:
Dive into the world of fascinating logic and test your mind in an exciting puzzle! Your task is to draw a line across the entire playing field, filling it completely, but keep in mind: there will be obstacles on the way that you need to bypass.

The game offers many levels, from simple to incredibly difficult, allowing each player to choose a suitable challenge.

title: Tile Living
description: Select matching tiles that can be connected with up to 3 straight lines to clear them! Clear all the tiles to complete the stage! Use the coins you collect from clearing stages to decorate your room!

title: Bubble Shooter Free 3
description: Bubble Shooter Free 3 is back with a long-awaited 3rd sequel to one of the most popular bubble shooter games there is! This bubble shooter embraces endless gameplay that is designed for players to enjoy hours and hours of fun without time pressure. It boasts the ‘Bubble Swap’ feature which lets you swap the current bubble in your shooter with the incoming one as well as the BOMB which creates huge explosions popping 15 bubbles at once! Now the players can play even more strategically!

title: Scooter Touchgrind Tricks 3D
description: Scooter Touchgrind Tricks 3D is an exciting and simple scooter game where you ride through challenging tracks filled with obstacles. Your main goal is to reach the finish line without crashing. As you play, you’ll need to dodge barriers, keep your balance, and react fast. You can collect coins along the way to unlock new scooters with cool designs. With smooth controls and many levels to explore, the game offers fun, speed, and tricks for anyone who loves action on two wheels.

title: Port Shipping Tycoon
description: Embark on a thrilling adventure as you build your own shipping empire in this addictive tile-flipping game! With just one click, start constructing your port business by flipping tiles to supply resources to bustling ports around the world.

title: Deep Fishing
description: Dive into the fun with Deep Fishing! Explore the deep blue, cast your line, and reel in a variety of exciting fish species. Upgrade your gear, unlock rare catches, and become the ultimate fishing legend! Easy to pick up, but hard to put down – can you score the rarest fish and show off your skills?

title: Texas Holdem Poker
description: Players compete for winning combinations of cards using their skills and intuition. The game has the ability to bet, bluff and recognize the bluff of other players. Players can choose different difficulty levels and customize their own game rules. The unique interface design and realistic atmosphere allow you to immerse yourself in the world of card games and enjoy the excitement anytime and anywhere.

title: Koi Fish Pond - Idle Merge Game
description:
An addictive idle merging game. Build your own Koi fish company and grow your business.
Release your Koi fishes into the pond and earn money every time they cross the finish line. Buy new Koi fishes (or collect them from the gift boxes), and merge the same level Koi fishes to upgrade into a new type. The higher-level of the Koi fishes, the more money you will earn. Use your earnings to buy upgrade packages in the Shop to help you make money faster!

title: Chroma Tower
description: Chroma Tower is a reverse-Tetris puzzle where you destroy instead of build! You're given a tower made of colored blocks. Drop blocks from above, match the color — and the entire connected chain disappears. Blocks fall to fill the gaps, potentially triggering new cascade reactions. Your goal is to demolish the tower completely within a limited number of moves.

title: Cute Relaxing Matching 3 Tiles
description:
Fun Farm Wonderland is a light but extremely fun game from our team

Fun Farm Wonderland is a puzzle game combined with a Farm theme, to create a feeling of lightness and relaxation for all players participating in them.

Have you ever played a match 3 tiles game with such cute design and interface? If not, don't skip our game, for the following reasons

title: Sudoku Vault
description: Sudoku Vault is a logic-based puzzle game featuring 4x4, 6x6, and 9x9 boards — each with four difficulty levels: Basic, Normal, Hard, and Expert. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, every grid offers a fresh challenge for your mind. Use smart NOTES to keep track of possibilities, and when you want to check your progress, tap the CHECK button — it will remove incorrect inputs and lock the correct ones, helping you stay focused on the solution.

title: Phone Case DIY Run
description: Phone Case DIY Run is a very fun simulation game. What type of phone case do you have now? If you are interested in making a phone case, then come and join us to learn about the process! Collect the models, choose your favorite color for painting, then paste the picture and choose the pendant. Finally, the more phone cases you collect when you reach the end, the more money you get. Have fun!

title: 4 Colors Card Mania
description:
4 Colors Card Mania is a thrilling and fast-paced card game inspired by the uno gameplay. Challenge against AI opponents in this colorful and strategic showdown.
Can you outwit your opponents and become the 4 Colors Card Mania champion? 
Shuffle the deck, deal the cards, and get ready for a colorful adventure!

title: Face Changes
description: Face Changer is a fun puzzle game in which you have to correctly put together different faces in order to move to the next level or achieve new and better results in the training mode.

title: Bubble Shooter Panda Blast
description:
Step into the colorful world of Panda Blast, where your mission is to rescue baby pandas by popping bubbles. Mama Panda needs your help to bring her lost cubs home. With vibrant graphics, charming animations, and exciting puzzles, this game is perfect for all ages.
Match three or more bubbles to clear them, free trapped pandas, and progress through hundreds of fun levels. Use powerful boosters, enjoy daily rewards, and experience smooth animations that bring the adventure to life.

title: Riders Downhill Racing
description: Get ready to join the riders in an exciting adventure with Riders Downhill Racing! Choose from various game modes, including free ride, race, and career, available in both 1 player and 2 player modes. Experience the thrill of riding different vehicles, such as ATV bikes, cross bikes, and speed boats, while wearing different costumes. Join any mode and have a blast! Remember to collect diamonds during the free ride to unlock more items.

title: Madness Driver Vertigo City
description: Mad drivers meet in the vertigo city with their cool super sport racing cars. The city offers a plethora of exciting activities and races. Fly through the ramps and collect gems to double your fun. Enjoy amusement park activities and play single or 2 player mode to challenge your friend in races or free drive activities. Begin the supercar simulator and customize your cars with unique designs.

title: Black Hole: Beauty Makeup
description: Black Hole: Beauty Makeup is a game where the player controls a black hole trying to devour as many objects around it as possible. Eat more, grow more, then create a beauty makeover!  Cool black hole simulator. Absorb different objects. Unlock skins. Do you like black hole and simulators?

title: Farm Business Saga
description: Create the farm you’ve always wanted in Farm Business Saga! ? Plant crops, care for animals, trade products, and grow your farming empire. With beautiful visuals, endless ways to customize, and engaging simulation gameplay, it’s fun for all ages!

title: Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle
description: Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle presents a fresh take on the classic word puzzle genre. With an array of unique gameplay mechanics, hints, and events, players are immersed in an engaging experience. The game's USP is its diverse content, offering a wide range of quotes across various themes, from inspirational to literary and beyond.

title: Ocean Kids Back To School
description: Welcome to Ocean Kids Back to school. It’s back to school time for these Kids. Can you help them get ready for their first day of classes? They’ll need to pick some cool outfits, new hairstyles, accessories, and school supplies too in this online dress-up and design game for girls. After you’re all done, help them to repair their vespa. Play and have fun!

title: Office Escape to Date
description: You have a date after work, but theres a catch: you need to get ready without your boss catching you! Complete your tasks, and prepare for your date before time runs out. But be careful, if the boss appears, quickly close the activity to avoid getting caught and return to work. How fast can you escape the office and be ready in time?

title: Mobile Legends Slime 3v3
description: Mobile Legends Slime 3v3 will bring you into a fun arena of exciting battles! In this 3v3 PvP game, you can unblock many slime characters. Enter a variety of colorful battle scenes. Each character has unique skills and fighting styles, ensuring you find the best gameplay.

title: Katana
description:
It's a first-person Katana game!
Slice all the enemy ninjas into small pieces and save the hostages. Use multiple katana swords and shurikens. Fight epic bosses and complete the levels.

title: Rocket Fest
description: Control the rocket to collect energy or other useful props along the way, and bomb the target at the end! This is a casual stress relief game.

title: Spa empire
description:
? BUILD YOUR DREAM SPA EMPIRE

Have you ever dreamed of running the ultimate spa, offering everything from soothing massages to exciting makeovers? Step into My Spa Empire, the idle arcade game where you dye hair, create stunning hair color makeovers and manage a bustling spa filled with exciting treatments. Design, upgrade, and expand your spa into the ultimate relaxation haven for your guests.

title: Nuts Stack Sort: Nuts & Bolts
description:
Challenging yet relaxing Nuts & Bolts sort puzzle with a unique twist!

Nuts Stack Sort: Nuts & Bolts is a fun and addictive stack sort puzzle game with a unique twist! Strategically sort and match three same color nuts based on box color in this jam puzzles. Every level offers an exciting challenge in this addictive sort colors puzzle game. Test yourself with this amazing brain teaser!

title: TearDown - Destruction SandBox
description:
The player is given complete freedom of action. You can explore various locations filled with structures. The main feature of the game is the ability to destroy everything you see.

Have you ever wanted to level a multi-storey house with your own hands? Now you have the opportunity to do just that! The physics of destruction is close to reality. You can use a variety of weapons to destroy objects, from a hammer to a powerful bazooka.

title: Labubu Merge
description:
Engage, Merge, and Challenge!
Dive into a labubu-matching journey where you collide identical labubu to evolve them and keep them from falling out of the box. But here's the twist: when the same labubus collide, they transform into an entirely new labubu. Can you merge your way to the grand labubu?

title: Conduct This
description: Conduct This is a cartoon-style free puzzle online game played on PuzzleGame for boys. You need to move the obstacles on the track so that the train can pass successfully. Get coins for passing levels and unlock the beautiful skins of the train. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. I guess it's easy for you. Are you ready to try it now?

title: Princesses of Quadrobics
description: Two beautiful princesses, Eliza and the Little Mermaid, are waiting for your help in creating the perfect images for practicing Quadrobics. First, create a gentle but expressive makeup for each of the girls and put your hair in a comfortable hairstyle. Then choose dresses, jewelry and accessories. But the adventures don't end there! Complete the look by putting masks in the form of adorable animals on the princesses. After all, this is a mandatory part of the Quadrobics trend!

title: Word Search with hints
description: Search for hidden words on the letter grid. Use hints to solve words and improve your skills. This game is great for players of all ages, and it's a fun way to spend time and test mental abilities!

title: Antistress Relaxation Box
description: Antistress - Relaxation Box is a fun casual game. Have you long been upset with some people in your life? He may be your date or a relative, and this game will vent your dissatisfaction! Choose a character and a tool for hitting, and your task is to beat the blood bar to 0 in a limited time. Easy to pick up, but informative and will give you hours of entertainment. Relax yourself and have fun!

title: Anaconda Runner
description: Anaconda Runner is a casual arcade game. In the snake kingdom, size is a status symbol. The bigger you are, the more powerful you are and the higher your status. So how do you increase your size?  There is a runway in front of you. There are many blue balls on the runway that can help you grow. See how far you can go, have fun!

title: Hidden Object Rooms Exploration
description: Explore a variety of rooms and find hidden items! With 18 levels and 6 items to discover in each room, enjoy the thrill of searching through different spaces like living rooms and more. Drag the screen to explore them. Get ready for an exciting adventure in 'Hidden Object Rooms Exploration'!

title: Gang War: Strike Shooter
description:
Welcome to a fast-paced multiplayer shooter! Break out of prison and dive straight into a brutal gang war. Join the Reds or the Blues, capture banks, warehouses, factories, and other city locations. Each captured zone earns you income — spend it on new weapons and character customization!

Play with friends, compete for dominance, and survive the dangerous streets. Only strength, strategy, and loyal teammates matter here. An open world full of conflict, shootouts, and endless possibilities.

title: Giant Crowd io House Capture
description: Come to lead your squad in Giant Crowd io House Capture, a fun .io strategy adventure game. You will expand your power in the city, occupy more houses and become the winner of the city. Grow your crowd by collecting more followers as you explore the city.

title: Traffic Escape Puzzle
description: Come to enter a complex maze in the Traffic Escape Puzzle! In this exciting puzzle game, get your car out safely. Find the right time to exit the vehicle. Be careful to avoid traffic jams and collisions. To slide the vehicle and create a clear path for cars. Each level presents a new traffic maze. And traffic flows become more and more complex. Come to use your ingenuity and strategize. Cleverly arrange all cars on a complex maze of roads.

title: Brick Game Classic
description: Brick Game Classic is a classic Tetris online game. If you are a fan of classic games, then this game that has been popular for many years is just right for you. When any row or column is filled, it is eliminated. You can change the shape of the cubes before they fall to eliminate them quickly. You can also make them fall faster if you are satisfied with their shape.  Now join the world of fun games.

title: Jewel Miner Quest
description: The dazzling world of gems awaits! Participate in thrilling events within limited moves or time. Solve captivating puzzles, complete fun tasks, and enjoy daily bonuses. Discover many terrific surprises with every move and see how far you can go.

title: Ultimate Yatzy
description: Ultimate Yatzy is the classic dice game that delivers endless fun and excitement. Roll five dice to score the best combinations and outsmart your opponents. Whether you're a casual player or a Yatzy pro, this game blends strategy and luck to keep you challenged and entertained. Aim for a Full House, a Straight, or the elusive Yatzy—every roll is a new chance to win.

title: Grow Wars.io
description: The battle between the heroes is beginning in the Grow Wars arena in this great io game! This battle is between the evolution heroes. Step into the arena and start slashing your opponents. Earn coins and buy new equipment or heroes in the shop. This battle can be played either single or 2 player. Call a friend and start playing together!

title: Save Her Tour
description: This complex and relaxing puzzle game you've read about has finally become a reality! Only the smartest can pass these brain teaser quizzes and save the girl! Each level will give you a scenario where you must use your ingenuity to solve the problem. If you mess up, it won't end well for our heroine. There are so many different challenges waiting to be solved. This is the best puzzle game ever! Solve interesting puzzles, protect the girl from harm, and experience the thrill of success.

title: Block Cut Cleaner
description: An original block puzzle where the field is filled with triangle blocks! Pull out your shapes and place them on the field to clear at 100%. But be careful: each piece you place can create new blocks! Use smart boosters to turn the tide: refresh your inventory, remove three random triangles or place a "clean" square that doesn't leave blocks behind. Plan your strategy to clear the board completely!

title: Fortune's Deck Solitaire
description:
Welcome to Fortune's Deck Solitaire, where ancient Tarot magic meets the timeless thrill of Tripeaks!

Three enchanted towers of fate await your touch - draw from the mystical deck and begin your journey through the arcana.

Inspired by the classic Tripeaks Solitaire, this magical twist invites you to clear the cards, trust your intuition, and let the deck reveal your fortune.

Will you find insight, mystery… or unexpected luck?

title: Bubble Tea
description: Bubble Tea – Color Game is all about mixing and matching and blending and fusing a huge assortment of flavors and colors to create cold drink concoctions that will have you licking your lips. Receive orders, choose the right ingredients, pour them all into a cup, and serve to your thirsty customers. Take care not to spill your drinks in the excitement!

title: Mind Gambit
description: Mind Gambit is a relaxing puzzle game inspired by the classic Peg Solitaire. Plan your moves carefully to jump and remove pegs until only one remains. There’s no timer, just pure strategy and thoughtful gameplay. With unlimited levels, the challenge never ends.

title: Math Duck
description:
You play as a fearless duck who battles enemies not with brute force, but with math smarts.

The rules are simple but addictive:
- Pick from shuffled number cards and combine them to make 10.
- Each correct match becomes your attack to damage enemies.
- Defeat foes, earn XP, and level up your duck!

Every level-up lets you choose from 3 unique upgrades. Each run is different, and your choices shape the way your duck fights.

Sharpen your mind, master the numbers, and guide your duck to victory!

title: Piggy Clicker
description: Piggy Clicker is a classic Clicker game, where you get to have Piggy as your pet and trough clicking buy him toys and such

title: King Kong Kart Racing
description: Get ready for an exhilarating kart racing experience in King Kong Kart Racing, where you'll navigate thrilling tracks, outmaneuver opponents, and collect fuel packs to extend your runway, all while immersing yourself in a fun cartoon theme, complete with simple controls for both desktop and mobile users and a great racing soundtrack.

title: Sudoku
description: Sudoku is a relaxing yet challenging number puzzle game made for Jio feature phones. Fill the 9×9 grid with numbers 1 to 9 without repeating any in a row, column, or 3×3 box. Choose from different difficulty levels and test your logic skills. The game works offline, saves your progress automatically, and offers smooth performance with clean visuals for KaiOS devices.

title: 2 Cars Run
description: 2 Cars Run is a dual racing game where you need to control the vehicle to avoid all obstacles. The difficulty of this game is that you have to control one car while taking care of the other. Well, are you ready to challenge this game now? Come on!

title: Mobile Phone Case Design & DIY
description: Welcome to Mobile Phone Case Design & DIY, the ultimate playground for those who love to personalize, design, and express their unique style!

title: Hyper Knight
description:
The apocalypse began and ancient creatures emerged from their graves. You are people's only hope. Put on your armor and start fighting.

-Collect the souls of monsters and earn money.
-Find new weapons and armors.
-Discover your magical powers.
-Find a companion and it will accompany you.
-Save different towns, encounter unlimited enemies.
-Destroy the bosses that threaten the world.

Why are you waiting? Come on, grab your sword and join us.

title: Merge Shooter
description: In "Merge Shooter," defend the galaxy by merging turrets to fight off alien invaders. Enhance your defense with special powers, navigating through levels filled with challenges. With its colorful graphics and user-friendly interface, it's an exciting adventure for all ages. Become the galaxy's hero by proving your achievements in this dynamic gameplay experience.

title: Dragon Egg
description: Players can unlock higher-level Divine Dragon eggs by moving three or more of them. Supports multi-level recursive synthesis of 5-color dragon eggs. Eventually, unlocking high-level dragon eggs can unlock the birth of new dragons, accompanied by splendid animations, filling the sense of achievement to the fullest.

title: My Cat Restaurant
description: Welcome to My Cat Restaurant, a casual kids cooking simulator game that you can play for free. Act as a chef and restaurant manager. Take orders, cook food, serve customers, and collect money. Plan your moves and workload in advance, and figure out an efficient routine.

title: Ragdoll Parkour Simulator
description: "Ragdoll Parkour Simulator" is an adrenaline-fueled parkour game that challenges players to navigate through urban environments with precision and style. With improved graphics and mechanics, players can expect an even more immersive experience than its predecessor.

title: Draw To Smash Zombie
description: Draw To Smash Zombie is an exciting drawing logic puzzle game where your creativity becomes the ultimate weapon against waves of silly zombies.

title: Connect Clues - The Missing Professor
description:
A tangled detective story is about to unfold.

Inspector Hale and Detective Crane are on the trail of a mysteriously vanished professor of history and archaeology — who also happens to be Crane’s old friend.
Professor Eldridge was always a touch eccentric, but disappearing without a word and leaving his office turned upside down was never part of his habits. He’s clearly in trouble — and in need of help.

title: Clash Crowd Game
description: Clash Crowd Game is an addictive arcade runner game where you tap to run, survive obstacles, and reach the destination. Control your crowd, avoid traps, and face thrilling challenges in every level. Easy controls, engaging gameplay, and colorful 3D graphics make this game perfect for quick fun. Run smart, grow your crowd, and prove your survival skills.

title: Highschool Mean Girls 3
description: Play the Highschool Mean Girls 3 game and get ready to join 6 unique characters in the wild world of fashion drama in this brand-new dress-up game for girls. Test your fashion guru skills and transform high school wallflowers into show-stopping style icons. Rack up those style credits with a fabulous curated wardrobe and accessories. This dress-up game is where high school drama meets fashion week, straight from your screen. Happy playing!

title: Color Cocktail
description: Clients are waiting for drinks from you, quickly prepare drinks for clients and collect points. Combine identical balls to get new fruits. Come on, everyone is waiting for you!

title: Escape Again
description: Together with the main character of the new online game Escape Again, you will go on a journey through the painted world in search of treasures and adventures. The location in which your hero will be will be visible on the screen in front of you. By controlling his actions you will have to move around the area. Overcoming various obstacles and traps, you will have to help the hero find special magic pins. With their help, he will be able to activate the portal leading to the next level.

title: Labubu Doll Mukbang Asmr Unblocked
description: Welcome to Labubu Doll Mukbang Asmr Unblocked, a charming, casual ASMR game that combines the joy of food, cooking, and ASMR sounds! Experience as a talented baker and join the lovely Labubu on a mouthwatering adventure. In the game, you will take orders from your diners, each with unique requests for bread. From croissants to loaves of baguettes, you need to pack each bread for your customers on time.

title: Super Kid Adventure
description: Hi there! It sounds like you're interested in playing Super Kid Adventure, an online game similar to Super Mario. To play, you'll need to jump on platforms, avoid obstacles and spikes, and defeat enemies. Don't forget to collect stars along the way! The game has 25 levels for you to explore, so there's plenty of adventure to be had.

title: Clownfish Pin Out
description: Clownfish Pin Out is an interesting and cute puzzle game, you need to help one little fish escape from a dangerous place. Tap the pin to make the waterfall to the fish and avoid the lava. Think before you move, or you will lose. Come on!

title: Cubica
description:
Get lost in a tranquil atmosphere with Cubica, a fun puzzle game designed to relax with a simple brain teaser. It's very simple! Blast blocks of identical colored cubes to make them disappear, making room for new ones. No rush, no complicated rules, just enjoy the game.
Immerse yourself in soft colors, pleasant sounds, and smooth gameplay that will allow you to forget about the hustle and bustle.

title: Smart Dots Reloaded
description: Smart Dots Reloaded is a fresh remake of the classic Dots and Boxes puzzle from Windows 3.1. Players take turns drawing lines between dots. Completing a square earns a point, and the game ends when the board is full. Featuring modern visuals, smooth animations, and both AI and two-player modes, this is a strategy game that’s easy to learn but hard to master.

title: Winter Wolf
description: Winter has come, and the snowfall has begun. Since it's Christmas time, the wolf must find three stars during the winter. The wolf needs to carefully hunt and catch three sheep, take their stars, and gather all the bones on the path to avoid starving. It must also be cautious of the hunters in the forest. At the end of the level, it must reach the dark portal to teleport to its desired location.

title: Daily Horoscope HD
description: Daily Horoscope HD offers personalized daily horoscopes at your fingertips. Click on your zodiac sign to uncover insights into your day, with the option to watch an ad for access to other sign readings.

title: Knock and Run. 100 Doors Escape
description: Become the fastest and most daring stickman in this fun arcade game! Your goal is to race through the corridors of the hotel, ring the doors, knock and slam them, arranging epic pranks. The main thing is not to get caught! Residents' reactions are unpredictable, and danger can lurk around every corner.

title: 3D Ball Balancer
description: 3D Ball Balancer is a fun 3D rolling ball game. Control the ball to roll on the floating bridge. There are obstacles all over the floating bridge, including broken bridges, ramps, single-plank bridges, etc. Not only do you have to control the direction of the ball, but you also have to control the speed of the ball. How far you can go? Have a try!

title: Hero Wizard: Save Your Girlfriend
description: One day when I woke up, I saw that my girlfriend wasn't beside me, so I started searching around for her but couldn't find her. Then I noticed a letter on the table, and the letter said: "If you want to see your girlfriend again, you'll have to pass through the magic forest to rescue her, but it won't be easy because you're not alone in the forest!" At first, I didn't understand, but..

title: Make Ten Tiles
description: Play Make Ten Tiles free online and sharpen your skills in a clever browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Merge number tiles, add to ten, and solve each logic puzzle in a satisfying brain game that blends fun with real mental math practice. This unblocked game loads fast and works smoothly at school or home. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game perfect for quick breaks and focused learning.

title: Big Bad Ape
description: In Big Bad Ape, you will play as an unstoppable giant ape. Join this casual battle and experience the exhilaration of destroying a city! Freed from a lab experiment, this furious monster is now unleashed. As this super monster, your job is to destroy everything.

title: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby
description: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby is a fast-paced, acrobatic and challenging stunt racing game. In these races with hundreds of different levels, each new track creates a completely different excitement with its special design. You can play Epic Car Stunt Race Obby against AI racers or with your friend in 2 player mode. Start the endless racing excitement now!

title: Makeup Stack
description: Would you like to make up? How many cosmetic brands do you know? In this game, these questions will get the answers. Let's play Makeup Stack game to make up for the customers. You will pass the various doors that you can choose as you like. As long as you can complete the task, it doesn't matter what you choose. Let's try this game right now to make up more people!

title: Capybara Skewer Match
description:
Capybara Skewer Match
Step into the cozy world of Capybara, your friendly skewer merchant! Help Capybara clear out the skewers by grilling and matching them before time runs out.

Capybara needs your help to keep the BBQ stand running. Can you master the grill, match all the skewers, unlock tasty collectibles, and make Capybara proud?

title: Gate Heroes Battle
description: Embark on a journey with your cute monsters and go through positive gates to build up your strength. This will help you defeat stronger enemies. Also watch out for traps and obstacles in your way. Try to reach your strongest form to defeat the final boss.

title: Pyramidz
description: Unleash the power of the gods in PyramidZ, a twist on the classic Match-3 genre where you slide entire rows and columns to align sacred hieroglyphs and trigger ancient magic.

title: Happy Glass Game
description: Happy Glass is a fun and engaging puzzle game where your goal is to fill an empty glass with water. Draw lines to create a path for the water to flow into the glass. The less you draw, the higher your score. With 80 challenging levels, you’ll need to use your creativity and logic to make the glass happy again. Enjoy this delightful game on both desktop and mobile devices!

title: Red Stickman vs Monster School
description:
Red Stickman vs Monster School - stickman game where you need to pick up different weapons and clear levels from mobs from the school of monsters. The game contains

- 60 levels
- 10 bosses
- Many types of different weapons!

Did you like the game "Red Stickman vs Monster School "? - Then write a review and play all our games about stickmen.

title: Perfect Asmr Cleaning
description: Immerse yourself in home cleaning and personal care with Perfect ASMR Cleaning! This is a casual cleaning simulator game where you can experience the whole process of cleaning work, such as washing carpets and trimming cat nails. Finish each task with full patience and enjoy the perfect sound of teeth polishing, cutting, and trimming.

title: Sweet Dessert Hole
description: Ready to make cute and tasty desserts? In Sweet Dessert Hole, you control a hole that sucks up various sweet toppings. Move the hole around to collect chocolate, cream, fruits, cookies, dan many more. Collect everything on the base before time runs out. Use your coins to upgrade the hole and make the gameplay faster and easier. After making one or more cakes, you can arrange them neatly on a tray. This game is simple, relaxing, and very satisfying to play.

title: Noob vs Zombie Apocalypse: shooting pro
description:
Post-apocalypse! Noob finds himself alone against zombies. Passing levels, he accumulates coins and picks up weapons.
There is a grenade launcher, a pistol, an uzi, a shotgun, a machine gun, a laser pistol, a rifle, a laser rifle - and so on!

Noob vs Zombie Apocalypse: shooting pro is an epic noob game in the world, similar to minecraft fnaf. Noob shoots at zombies with a variety of weapons like a rambo. Noob miner starts his fighting fnaf survival!

There are 60 levels and 15 bosses in total!

title: Trolley fun
description: Trains connect cities and carry goods, but bandits are constantly attacking them! Collect resources, upgrade your train to repel all attacks!

title: Summer Maze
description: Summer Maze is a fun summer puzzle game filled with sunshine and bright colors. Guide the ball through the intricate mazes, filling all the space inside. Earn gems, unlock new skins and enjoy simple but addictive gameplay. Perfect for lovers of logic games, arcades and puzzles.

title: Max Crusher 2 - Destruction, Drift, and Racing!
description: Get ready for unbridled automotive chaos in Max Crusher 2 - Destruction, Drift, and Racing!– a game where the three elements of extreme driving merge: devastating crash tests, masterful drifting, and frantic racing!

title: Block Puzzle Travel
description:
The goal of the game is to destroy as many blocks as possible. By doing so, you will earn points for completing the game perfectly.
By solving puzzles, you train your attention, thought processes and brain.
In this game you have to achieve the maximum result, and pass all levels.

title: Fire snake
description: Help the fire snake slither safely home! Dodge dangerous obstacles, collect shiny coins, and master tricky levels. Can you guide the snake through every challenge? Play now and test your skills!

title: Idle Baseball Tycoon
description: Play Idle Baseball Tycoon free online and step into a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Build your dream team, upgrade stadiums, recruit players, and grow profits in a smart manager sim that blends idle strategy with brain game decision-making. This unblocked game runs smoothly at school or home and is fully mobile-friendly, working perfectly on desktop and mobile. It’s a free online game made for quick breaks and long-term domination.

title: Mahjong Cute Tiles
description: Enjoy a classic Mahjong game, now in another dimension! Rotate the board, explore fresh tile layouts and challenge your mind. Show off your skills and use powerful boosters like undo moves, tile shuffles, bombs and hints to help you advance faster.

title: About a Frog
description: Jump into the world of About a Frog, a fun and free online game where you play as a brave little frog. Explore colorful levels, dodge obstacles, and enjoy the adventure on your phone or computer. It’s a light and exciting challenge for players who love quick reflexes and cute characters.

title: Hex Sense
description:
Guide Mochi across risky hex lands. His hex sense lets him read the numbers that give clues of how many dangers are nearby, and use them to find a safe path. Reveal tiles, flag traps, and guide brave Mochi to the Exit. 

Hex Sense is a minesweeper-style puzzle on a field of hex tiles. Some tiles hide dangerous hazards, but clues around them help you figure out where it's safe to go. Cross several unique chapters filled with new kinds of hazards and clues.

title: Find & Restore: Hidden Puzzle
description:
Find & Restore: Hidden Puzzle! is a relaxing and brain-teasing puzzle game where you must spot, drag, and fix the misplaced parts of beautiful images.
Each level challenges you to find hidden pieces, pull them out, and place them exactly where they belong.
With handcrafted levels, soothing music, and satisfying visuals, it's the perfect game to relax and train your observation skills.
Can you restore every picture to perfection?

title: Bubble Shooter GO
description:
Pop. Match. Dominate.
Step into the world of precision and strategy with the ultimate bubble shooter experience.

Solo Mode – Play at your own pace or push your skills to the limit. Chain powerful combos, unlock boosters, and master every level as you progress through increasingly challenging stages.

1v1 Battles – Challenge a friend or face off against opponents. Use smart angles, fast reflexes, and well-timed power-ups to outplay your rival in intense bubble duels.

title: Chroma Trek
description:
Dive into the glowing world of Chroma Trek, a vibrant neon platformer where every step is a test of skill and perception. With dazzling visuals and a unique color-switching mechanic, each level feels like a handcrafted puzzle filled with dynamic challenges.

Shift colors to phase through obstacles, stay sharp to dodge traps, and be inspired by motivational messages that guide you along the way. Your goal? Reach the shimmering Finish Crystal and conquer every stage with style.

title: Plants Warfare
description: Plants Warfare is a shooting game where you step into the shoes of the cute plants. Aim your projectiles, and take down the zombies with strategic aiming and precision shots. Use the environment to your advantage—ricochet bullets and eliminate multiple targets with the least shots possible! Collect stars, customize your look, and prove you’re the ultimate plant defense.

title: Monster Vs Zombie
description: Slide the monster to help it eat all the zombies in the way. Use your strategic thinking and problem solving skill to avoid all obstacle and reach the gate to go to the next level.

title: ASMR Nail Treatment
description: Today's patient is dealing with thickening of the fingernails. Help her maintain good nail hygiene by providing proper nail care. Showcase your medical skills by performing this ASMR Nail Treatment game. Once the treatment is done, dress her in fashionable outfit and create captivating nail art using various styles and accessories.

title: Real Motorbike Simulator Race 3D
description: Ride in the most awesome environment of this best superbike simulator 2024 which is designed especially for performing the craziest bike tricks and stunts to win amazing prizes in this Extreme Motorbike Simulator Game. the realistic physics of fast motorcycle and a lot of options to choose between different motorbikes give you unlimited fun in Extreme Motorbike Simulator 3d.

title: Russian Derby Crash
description:
Russian Derby Crash is a thrilling game that immerses you in the atmosphere of spectacular car racing with elements of destruction. You'll control one of five Russian cars or a tank. Destroy cars on the training ground and unlock new ones!
This game has a unique twist: in addition to cars, there's a tank on the training ground, from which you can shoot at other participants!

title: Dynamons 7
description:
Embark on a brand new Dynamons adventure in Dynamons 7! This online monster collecting game includes two fresh areas to explore; Tall Pines world and the bonus cave.

Seasoned Dynamons connoisseur Jovani will tell you everything you need to know to become a true Dynamon Captain. Encounter Crocynos, Huango, Cybeenyx, Aragonyx and many more special Dynamons. Recruit them for your team and beat others in thrilling 1v1 battles with special attacks and power-ups.

title: Zen Mini Games 2
description: Zen Mini Games 2 contains many different puzzle games. For example, let all the balls fall into the empty boxes on the screen so that the balls don't fall out. The difficulty of the game increases step by step. If you want to try different puzzle games, don't miss the Zen Mini Games 2!

title: Peg Solitaire
description: Engage your mind with the classic puzzle game, Peg Solitaire. The objective is simple yet challenging: clear the board by jumping pegs over each other until only one peg remains. This timeless game tests your strategic thinking and planning skills, offering various levels of difficulty to keep you entertained.

title: Brainstorming 2D
description: Brainstorming 2D is a puzzle game. In each slider puzzle, you will see a grid with colored grid edges with squares inside these borders. The squares are the same color as the grid edges. The number of colors may vary. Each slider puzzle aims to get rid of all blocks locked within the edges of the grid.

title: Backrooms Among Impostor & Rolling Giant
description:
Now you must escape from Impostor Among Us and Rolling giant.
But beware granny sometimes accidentally appear to haunt you!
Grab all phone before time run out and call your friend to help you!

title: Cosmo Void
description: Enter the dazzling void of space where only sharp reflexes and split-second decisions can lead you to victory. Cosmo Void is a high-speed action runner where your space journey becomes more intense with every level. Face shifting obstacles, sudden turns, and blinding speed as you pilot your cosmic vessel through an ever-evolving space labyrinth.

title: Flick Shot Soccer
description: Flick Shot Soccer is a fun and addictive soccer shooting game where every goal is all about precision. Simply drag to aim and position your shot, then release to kick and send the ball flying into the net. Easy controls make it perfect for anyone to pick up and play, while smart angles and timing are needed to score consistently.

title: Fashion Battle for Survival
