description: In this puzzle game you have to test your memory by guessing the cards in pairs. Each correctly guessed pair brings you closer to winning the game round. And each successfully completed round opens the doors to the world of fashion, allowing you to dress up the main character of the game - an Asian beauty with a daring character. Remember that the time to complete the round is limited by a timer.

title: Sweet Haunt 2
description: Guide the ghost to pick up all of the candy and get it to the exit in this Sokoban-like puzzle game. 50 challenging levels to complete. You'll need to pick up candy carefully as depending on how they are carried, the ghost and the candy might not fit into the pathway to the exit. Use bombs strategically to destroy objects the ghost is carrying to be sure you can make it to the exit and not get stuck.

title: SHOT CAN WILD
description: Keep tapping to shoot and prevent the can from falling! The game ends when you run out of ammo. Hit the center of te target for a COOL SHOT! Chain COOL SHOT to restore ammo!

title: Colors&Forms
description:
Dynamic and exciting!
Choose the game mode!
Complete missions and pass all levels!
Levels differ in color palettes and falling elements.
Interact with the objects appearing on the game screen, which complicate the process of the game.
After accumulating enough pieces, unlock the game type “Infinity”!
Choose your favorite level and accumulate as many pieces as possible to beat your opponents!

title: Avoid The Spikes
description: Jump and dodge all the spikes to avoid dying, get score for each touch of the wall and get gems while jumping to then be able to buy new skins in the in-game store in which there are 22 to unlock in exchange for the gems obtained.

title: Pickle Ball Clash
description: Step into the fast-paced world of Pickle Ball Clash — a thrilling sports game where every match is a battle of skill, speed, and strategy. Customize your character, unlock powerful paddles, and climb the competitive ranks from backyard brawls to pro-level leagues. Whether you're smashing winners or pulling off trick shots, the court is yours to conquer. Are you ready to clash?

title: Bark & Blast
description: Crash-land on a post-apocalyptic planet in Bark & Blast! Help a brave alien dog survive and escape in this thrilling 2D platformer action RPG. Test your aim, strategy, and courage in an epic adventure. Play now and conquer the challenges!

title: Travel Story Match
description: Embark on a global adventure with Travel Story Match! Match 3 identical travel items to complete exciting puzzles. Use powerful boosters to tackle tricky combinations, explore iconic destinations, and uncover hidden gems. Complete Daily Missions and Weekly Challenges, collect rewards, and enjoy hundreds of thrilling levels. Start your journey now and create your very own unforgettable travel story!

title: Little master of assembly
description: The gameplay of this game is puzzle assembly type, mainly according to the room suggested by the picture, according to the objects in the room, the use of parts to splice the room objects

title: Car Collision Master
description: Rev up for Car Collision Master Jagged canyons frame your blue jeep versus orange-black rivals on a looping desert track. Smoke trails and starry arches amp the chaos—customize your rig, battle friends, and dominate leaderboards in this wheel-warping thrill ride. Feel the V8 roar; claim victory in dust and daring!

title: Merge Hero - Survival Tower Defense
description:
Quickly merge heroes to defend against monster attacks in intense tower defense battles.
Merge Heroes is a strategy tower defense game. Form and upgrade your hero units to prepare for an epic conflict battle that will test your wisdom and abilities.

title: Bubble Trouble 2: Rebubbled
description:
A classic arcade bubble shooter where you play as a devil in a trench coat, armed with a harpoon gun to tackle dangerous bouncing bubbles. Each bubble you shoot splits into smaller ones until they're completely destroyed. Navigate through levels with platforms and power-ups while avoiding contact with any bubble.

How to play:
- Clear all bubbles from each level to progress
- Avoid getting touched by bubbles - or lose a life
- Features single-player and cooperative multiplayer modes

title: Monster Squad Rush
description:
Assemble your squad of powerful monsters, evolve them into champions, and claim victory in the ultimate battle arena. Adventure, strategy, and competition await!

Whether you’re rushing through the course, collecting monsters, or battling for supremacy, Monster Squad Rush offers non-stop action and fun. Build your legacy as the ultimate monster trainer and conquer the arena today!

title: Hexa Sort
description: Hexa Sort offers a delightful blend of puzzle challenges, strategic matching, and satisfying merging experience. Engage your mind with stimulating brain games that involve clever puzzle solving and logical maneuvers, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a mental workout.

title: Pool Merge
description:
This is an arcade puzzle with billiard physics and 2048 merge mechanics. Shoot balls, combine identical ones and score points!
Game modes:
Classic: plan your moves, avoid overflowing the field. With each new open ball level, the limit of allowed balls on the playing field increases.
Arcade: play for time, do not let the balls fall into the holes. Merging balls adds time to the timer, balls that fall into the holes take time away.

title: Farm Mahjong 3D
description: Have you ever imagined playing your favorite 3D mahjong game in a farm setting? Mahjong 3D Farm does just that! It brings the popular Mahjong 3D game into the charming world of farms, filled with adorable animals, crops, and farming tools for you to match! So why wait? Play Mahjong 3D Farm Connect now and solve the puzzle amidst the fields!

title: Burger Day
description: Burger Day is a fun and fast-paced arcade game that puts you in charge of a busy burger kitchen. Stack ingredients to serve up tasty orders as quickly as possible. Your speed and decision-making skills are tested as customer demands increase. Satisfy hungry customers to unlock fresh challenges and advance through exciting levels.

title: Screw Spin
description:
Screw Spin is a satisfying logic puzzle where you unscrew colorful bolts and sort them into matching boxes. It’s relaxing yet challenging, combining planning, logic, and a touch of strategy.

Each level introduces a new layout with bolts of different colors. Your goal is to clear the entire panel by removing all the bolts, carefully managing your limited storage slots and placing each bolt in the correct container.

title: Girly Puzzle
description: Place blocks on the grid to form vertical or horizontal rows. When no more blocks can be placed, the game is over. Collect items to increase Your Score!

title: Epic Mine
description: In the game, you will need to correctly organize the smelting of resources in order to sell everything as profitably as possible. At the same time, it is important not to forget that resources should also be spent on skill upgrades! The game values quick reactions, but the ability to earn well will allow you to overcome any difficult spot in the game with patience and intelligence.

title: Smartle
description: Smartle is a free online word puzzle game where you rearrange letters by swapping them on a 5x5 grid to form words. Win the game by creating 5 horizontal 5-letter words on the field. There are multiple valid combinations of words which can win the game.

title: 2048Skill Edition
description: Ini adalah permainan kesenangan untuk 2.048, dan terutama kami telah menambahkan permainan dan keterampilan baru yang memungkinkan pengguna untuk mengalami 2048 berbeda.

title: Supermarket Manager Simulator
description: Supermarket Manager Simulator is a business game. Have you ever fantasized about running your supermarket in your childhood?  Play as the store manager in this game and stock up on a variety of goods, from chips and fries to meats, burgers, vegetables, and fruits. From stocking, and shelving to selling, you will be the one to take care of it!  Don't hesitate to start your entrepreneurial journey now and become a great store tycoon!

title: Thief Stick Puzzle Man Escape
description: Enjoy a hilarious and brain-twisting adventure in Thief Stick Puzzle: Man Escape. It’s a mix of stickman comedy, clever puzzle levels, and funny escape challenges that will keep you hooked for hours! You play as a sneaky thief stickman trying to escape from tricky situations. To survive, you’ll need to solve smart brain teaser puzzles. For example, finding the correct path through a maze to obtain treasure, or bypassing a cutting machine to save a puppy.

title: Steampunk Tower Builder
description: Build the tallest tower and touch the sky with the steampunk tower builder! Simply tap to release the blocks, making sure to release them at the right time to balance the tower. The tower will rise higher with each correctly placed block. If a block falls, you’ll have to start over. Use the funds you’ve accumulated to build as high as possible and climb the leaderboard!

title: Little Bugs
description: you are the guardian of a group of lost beetles. At each stage, the beetles approach two pictures. One is a safe path forward, but the other is a trapdoor into the abyss. Your mission is to decipher the hint—a piece of a vegetable or an animal—to figure out which path is safe. If you misunderstand the clue, you won't be able to reach the finish line. Every choice matters in this charming world of clever puzzles. Are you ready to lead your little bugs to safety?

title: Knots
description: Knots is a colorful HTML5 puzzle game for all ages! This is a simple logic puzzle where players move puzzle pieces to arrange the knot drawings correctly. Move hexagon tiles to connect matching knots and create beautiful patterns. Easy to learn, relaxing to play, and perfect for kids and adults — with lots of bright levels and fun challenges for the whole family!

title: Tripeaks Solitaire Escapes
description: Play Solitaire TriPeaks Escapes, a relaxing card game with a warm summer vibe. Explore hundreds of unique solitaire levels featuring stunning graphics and vibrant beach landscapes. Master challenging card puzzles using powerful boosters, train your brain and sharpen your strategy. Dive into this colorful TriPeaks world and enjoy a soothing, slow-paced adventure. Escape the daily grind and find your zen in every hand you play!

title: Thread Match
description: Immerse yourself in the world of Thread Match — a unique and exciting puzzle where you sort colorful threads to complete embroidery patterns. Unravel layers of palettes, carefully working your way down to reveal hidden threads. Use logic and strategy to avoid running out of moves. But be careful — the color palette can be tricky, and every choice matters!

title: Guess The Italian Brainrot Animals
description: Get ready for a wild and hilarious ride with Guess the Italian Brainrot Animals, a fast-paced, emoji-fueled trivia game that tests your knowledge of 64 iconic Italian Brainrot characters! From the most famous to the obscure, this game challenges you to guess the correct character based on three emoji clues before the timer runs out. Think you’re a Brainrot expert? Prove it!

title: Cubes 2048.io
description: Begin an exciting .io battle where Snake meets 2048 in a nervous arcade showdown. Control your cube snake, collect, merge, and grow bigger while outsmarting opponents in this classic action-puzzle game. Control your snake to navigate around the map. Collect more cubes and merge the same numbers to reach 2048. Match the same number to make it bigger.

title: Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon
description: Get spooky and stylish in Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon, where gothic meets glam in a 3-level makeover game. Treat Wednesday to a facial, apply stunning dark-themed makeup, and finish off with iconic dress-up fashion in her unique style. From skincare to eyeliner, you control every detail of her transformation. Whether you’re a fan of the Addams aesthetic or just love alternative beauty, this salon experience offers a complete glow-up from head to toe.

title: Seafaring Memory Challenge
description: Set sail into the captivating depths of the ocean with Seafaring Memory Challenge! Match pairs of sea-themed icons in an endless array of levels. Test your memory skills as you uncover treasures like colorful fish, delicate sea shells, and sunken treasures. With no level limit, the adventure never ends, providing hours of entertainment. Stay sharp and immerse yourself in the mesmerizing world beneath the waves!

title: Find Goods
description: Find and tap on goods! Clear the stage when you find all the goods. Game over when time runs out. You can scroll and zoom the map. Be careful, as tapping items other than those specified will reduce the time limit.

title: Crowd Evolution!
description: you start as a single person and grow your team by running through the city and gathering people of the same color. Your goal is to build a massive army that no one can stop! Chase down and absorb smaller crowds, but be careful, as larger crowds will try to absorb you. Use strategy and quick reflexes to become the biggest crowd on the map before time runs out!

title: Pesky Moles
description:
An ordinary farmer lived a quiet life and grew vegetables, but at some point, moles began to attack his garden and eat the entire crop.
After the next harvest, he decides to take everything into his own hands and protect his garden.
In Pesky Moles, you have to protect your garden from moles for a certain amount of time. The more pests you manage to neutralize and the more crops you save, the more coins you get. With the coins you earn, you can buy traps that will help you protect your garden.

title: Draw Bridge Challenge
description: Drag to create a path and guide the car to the goal! You can only draw the line once, be careful not to break the car! To become a good bridge builder, you just need to drag with one finger to draw a bridge that is stable enough for the car to reach flags. You can draw a bridge on only one line, so make sure safety comes first.

title: Fun Mini Games For Princess
description: Welcome to Fun Mini Games For Princess, a collection of mini casual games for kids. Dive into the gaming world and enjoy the fun of playing at your fingertips! Whether you are a casual gamer who looks for relaxation or a skillful player with a purpose, you will find your favorite game and enjoy endless fun in our mini games. Our mini games cover a large range of categories.

title: Italian Brainrot Drag Merge Puzzle
description: A Revolutionary Jigsaw Experience. Each level, one image is randomly selected and split into 3×3, 4×4, 5×5, or 6×6 pieces, then completely shuffled. Your goal is simple: restore the picture by placing every piece in its correct position. But this is no ordinary jigsaw. When two neighboring pieces are placed correctly next to each other, they merge into a single movable cluster. Instead of slow, one-by-one placement, you can drag any piece or merged group onto another to instantly swap positions.

title: Bouncy Barn
description:
Bouncy Barn is a lively farm simulation game where players explore the charming world of farm life. Care for cute animals like chickens, cows, and goats. 

Feed and nurture your animals to keep them happy, and in return, they’ll provide valuable produce like eggs and milk. Harvest these goodies and sell them at the market to earn profits for expanding and upgrading your farm. With vibrant graphics and engaging gameplay, Bouncy Barn provides a fun escape to create your dream farm!

title: Sprunki Quiz
description:
Sprunki Quiz is a wild and wacky guessing game where you match weird names to even weirder Sprunki characters!
Can you tell who’s who between Simon, Oren, Pinky, Raddy, and the rest of the crew?
Play in two chaotic modes:
Guess the Name  – See the name, pick the right picture!
Guess the Image – Look at the picture, choose the right name!
It’s fast, funny, and full of Sprunki madness.
Warning: extreme brainrot vibes ahead. Ready to Sprunk?

title: Taxi Driver Simulator
description: Taxi Driver Simulator offers an immersive experience behind the wheel of a taxi. Complete Work Mode’s 80 levels with 3 yellow stars to become an eligible taxi driver. Follow the blue direction indicators, pick up passengers, and deliver them to their destinations efficiently. Slow down before steering to save time. Don’t forget to buy the other 9 cars in the garage as you earn money! In Free mode, drive farther and pay for fuel at gas stations. Keep serving customers without advancing levels.

title: Solitaire Farm Seasons 3
description: Solitaire Farm: Seasons 3, the highly anticipated sequel, continues the charming farm theme of Seasons 1 and 2 with incredible 3,400+ levels! Train your brain with diverse solitaire puzzles while enjoying country life. Explore new scenes and travel to new countries. Grow new crops such as Gooseberry, Foxgloves, Celery, Papyrus, Loquat, Prickly Pears, Berseem, and Blackberries. Enjoy stunning visuals and engaging gameplay in this delightful solitaire adventure!

title: Cards 2048
description: Are you looking for a fresh twist on a familiar game? Cards 2048 is the perfect blend of classic solitaire and the popular 2048 puzzle game! This unique combination creates an engaging brain teaser that's highly addictive. As you merge cards with matching numbers, the challenge intensifies, offering a true test of your skill and strategy. Sharpen your logic and enjoy hours of fun with Cards 2048, the ultimate card merging game for puzzle enthusiasts!

title: Hobo Speedster
description: Hobo Speedster is an exciting motorcycle platform BMX game featuring 2D cartoon graphics. Your mission? Keep the motorcycle balanced until you reach the finish line. As you earn coins and diamonds, upgrade your current bike at the motorcycle settlement, purchase 3 more motorcycles from the Shop, and unlock 4 additional riders in the Decorate section. Ready for a personal challenge? Explore various maps and aim to complete all 7 tasks for extra rewards!

title: Mojicon Garden JigSolitaire
description: Piece together a paradise in Mojicon Garden Jigsaw Solitaire! Solve beautiful puzzles to restore a dry meadow back to a lush, blooming garden. Enjoy a meditative experience with smooth controls and the iconic Mojicon art style. Can you bring the garden back to life?

title: Bolt Climb: Tap to the Top
description: Bolt Climb: Tap to the Top is an addictive one-touch climbing game where you control a cute bolt on a mission to climb as high as possible! Just tap and hold to rise — the higher you go, the harder it gets. Can you set a new record?

title: Schoolboy Runaway: room escape
description: Step into the gripping adventure of Schoolboy Runaway: Room Escape, where strategy and mystery go hand in hand. A young schoolboy finds himself locked in a strange room, full of tricky puzzles and hidden clues. Help him think fast, solve each challenge, and escape before it’s too late. Play for free on both mobile and desktop and see if you can unravel the secrets of every room.

title: Hexon Rush
description:
Hexon Rush is a time limited puzzle game with a little bit of sci-fi look.

Main goal in the Hexon Rush is connecting all the lines inside the hexagonal tiles before time runs out.  There are 600 levels with increasing size, difficulty and complexity.

Don't worry, you will have two types of helpers to solve these puzzles. Be careful when you spend them because they are hard to obtain.

title: Ninja: Bamboo Assassin
description:
You will be immersed in the dangerous world of ninja art, where every movement, every breath are decisive moments in your mission.

Your goal is to approach your enemies unnoticed, and to achieve this, you will have to skillfully use your blade to cut through the bamboo thickets, making your way through the dense forest.

But be on your guard, your enemies are not slumbering, and you can be detected at any moment.

title: Zombie Idle Defense
description: Prepare for a zombie showdown in Zombie Idle Defense! In this exciting idle defense game, you will be the last line of defense against wave after wave of zombie attacks! Build your defenses,upgrade your weapons, put your automatic turrets on fire, and fight off the undead!

title: Art Master Origins
description:
ART MASTERS: ORIGINS - COLORING BOOK is a educational painting game. It is a combination of color by numbers mechanics, with polish artists artworks to discover and the epic atmosphere of RPG games.

USP:
• Relax and feel like a real artist coloring by numbers every artwork to create legendary paintings! 
• Fulfill collection of painting’ trophies of every art trend!
• Distinguish a falsificate from a real work!

title: Mech Monster Arena
description: Mech Monster Arena is a robot-fighting turn-based strategy game. Differently in this fighting game, you don't need to learn how to operate the robot and release each skill. You only need to learn the basic skill counter rules and select the skills flexibly. By earning EXPs and coins from battles in Mech Battle, you can fight with AI opponents and develop your robot. When you have some sources to upgrade your robot in the Mech Warehouse, you can challenge other players in the Arena. Have fun!

title: Chicken Wild Run
description: Aim for the goal while collecting coins! Tap to change direction left and right. When your stamina runs out, the game is over. Get a kiss from a cute girl and become invincible! In invincible mode, you can bounce off obstacles. If you collect 10 mysterious bottles, the coins on the road will turn into high-scoring diamonds for a certain period of time.

title: Mineblock Obby
description: Minecraft Obby is an amazing parkour game that you can play totally free! Do your best as you navigate through challenging obstacle courses, avoiding pitfalls and traps along the way. Collect coins scattered throughout each level to buy yourself a new sword and enhance your gameplay experience. With each jump and sprint, you'll improve your skills and push your limits. Dive into the blocky world of Minecraft Obby, avoid obstacles, collect those coins, and most importantly—have fun!

title: Hex Triple Match
description: Hex Triple Match brings together puzzle challenges, strategic matching and merging experiences. This game consists of clever puzzle-solving and logical manoeuvres, making it ideal for those seeking a brain workout.  You need to consider how to place them to eliminate them faster. Each colour represents an item, giving you a great gaming experience. Beautiful graphics bring you visual enjoyment. Come and join the merging game world.

title: Color Conquest: Territory War
description:
Command one of 4 unique factions in this intense RTS war! Capture territories to expand your army and destroy enemy bases.

Factions:

Grey: High HP (Tank), slow production.

Green: Fast spawn (Swarm), low HP.

Blue & Yellow: Balanced fighters.

Capture neutral zones to increase your unit capacity. Can you dominate the map?

title: Dream Room Makeover
description: Welcome to Dream Room Makeover, part of the beloved Room Makeover game! You've just purchased a charming old house with a sprawling garden, but it's in need of some TLC. Get ready to renovate with stunning graphics and fresh furniture. Your dream home awaits – play Dream Room Makeover for free today!

title: Stack Sorting
description: Welcome to Stack Sorting! Your task is to organize colorful cylinders by clicking on stacks. Move the topmost cylinder to an empty stack or one with a matching top cylinder. Navigate through Easy Mode with plenty of stacks and time, or challenge yourself in Hard Mode with fewer stacks. Complete all levels within the time limit to emerge victorious!

title: Stunt Bike Rider Bros
description: Stunt Bike Rider Bros is a motorcycle racing and show game that you can play in both 1 player and 2 player mode with your friend. There are 3 different game modes in the game. In the "Racing Mode", you can compete with both your friend and other motorcycle drivers. In the "Career Mode", try to complete the difficult stages in a limited time. In the "Open World", you can earn coins and diamonds by performing various stunts with your motorcycles.

title: Halloween Challenge
description: Get ready for a spooky adventure in Halloween Challenge! Bats are flying through the night, carrying candy that you must protect. Your mission? Tap the bats before they escape with the sweet treats. But beware, if even one bat escapes, the game is over! With simple controls and addictive gameplay, Halloween Challenge offers a fun and fast-paced experience for players. Test your reflexes, compete for high scores, and enjoy the eerie Halloween atmosphere. How long can you defend the candy?

title: Princess Rescue Fruit Connect
description: Begin a fruity puzzle adventure. Princess Rescue Fruit Connect is a delightful match puzzle game where your mission is to rescue a beautiful princess by matching fruits and solving tricky levels. Connect two identical fruits to eliminate them. But notice clearing the board before time runs out. All while progressing to rescue the princess.

title: Sprunki Match
description:
Sprunki Match: Train Your Brain with Sprunki Insanity!

Flip cards, match pairs, and enter the absurdly adorable world of Sprunki — the viral meme sensation! Test your memory across 30 colorful levels packed with expressive Sprunki characters, each more ridiculous than the last. With vibrant cartoon graphics, two game modes, and pure chaos in every flip, it’s time to sharpen your brain and embrace the Sprunki madness. Who knew memory games could be this unhinged?

title: Dream Restaurant 3D
description: Ready for the ultimate restaurant challenge in Dream Restaurant 3D? Embark on a journey to establish your very own restaurant empire. The mission is straightforward: swiftly attend to customers, prepare delectable hamburgers, stack them up, and gracefully serve them around the tables. Expand your team by hiring proficient waiters, accumulate profits, and gradually construct an unparalleled restaurant empire!

title: Easter Style Junction Egg Hunt Extravaganza
description: Immerse yourself in the charm of Easter Valley in "Easter Style Junction: Egg Hunt Extravaganza"! Join four lively bunnies in a grand Easter celebration featuring a Bunny Dressup Competition and Egg Catch Challenge amidst picturesque landscapes and vibrant meadows.

title: Guivo.io
description:
Challenge the world in Guivo.io, a skill-based Match-3 battle arena playable instantly in your browser! Match pieces, shatter ice and outscore opponents in lightning-fast 2-minute rounds.
Climb our chess-inspired Elo ranking system based solely on skill, earn Trophies with each victory and see your name showcased in the winner's banner. Ready to prove you're the puzzle master?

title: Muscle Up Master
description: The aim of this game that will help you become a muscle master, a boxer or an MMA fighter is to reach the best level! In this adventure where you start with a weak body, start exercising and reach a more muscular body by merging with the characters. As you progress, participate in fighting tournaments and grow faster with the rewards you earn!

title: Meme Mukbang ASMR Game
description: Welcome to Meme Mukbang ASMR Game, the ultimate livestream mukbang experience! Step into the world of a quirky mukbang streamer, where you’ll indulge in delicious dishes and share your mukbang ASMR moments with a growing audience. The more you eat and interact, the more you earn, all while building your fame in the livestream world!

title: Makeup Trends: Then And Now
description: Step into the exciting world of makeup transformations with  Makeup Trends: Then And Now! Join influencer Kiki as you explore the evolution of beauty trends from the early 2000s to 2024. Experiment with y2k-VSCO and emo-euphoria dark looks, mixing vibrant eyeshadows, bold lip colors, and edgy styles. Customize unique hairstyles and accessories to complete your makeup looks. With endless possibilities to mix and match, become a beauty trendsetter in this fun and engaging game for girls.

title: Master Blender
description: Becoming the Strongest Bartending Master！Tap the bottle lightly to pour water. Organize the water so that each bottle's water is distributed to the corresponding colored cup!

title: Around Elbrus
description: In the game “Around Elbrus”, the player controls a character who rushes down Mount Elbrus. The goal of the game is to collect all the coins and overcome various obstacles such as rocks, cliffs and avalanches. The game features beautiful graphics and addictive gameplay and is suitable for players of all ages.

title: Jail Prison Van Police Game
description:
Get ready for action-packed gameplay! Take on the role of a police officer, drive the prison van, and ensure the secure transport of criminals in this exciting Police Bus Game

Immerse yourself in the intense world of law enforcement with the Jail Prison Van Police Game. Assume the role of a dedicated police officer tasked with transporting high-profile criminals in a specially designed prison van.

title: Turbo Stunt Racing
description: Experience high-speed thrills in Turbo Stunt Racing! Perform epic stunts, race fierce rivals, and upgrade unique cars in this 3D arcade racer packed with action, traps, and ramps. Master precision driving and dominate every level!

title: Robot Terminator T Rex
description: Ready for an adventure in Robot Terminator T-Rex! Enter the wonderful world where robot dinosaurs and zombies collide in a nervous battle. You'll control a terrifying robotic T-Rex, equipped with powerful weapons and amazing abilities.

title: Ball Craze Sort
description:
Ball Craze Sort is a fun, relaxing, and addictive puzzle game where your goal is to sort colorful balls into the correct order. What starts as a simple task quickly turns into a brain-teasing challenge as more colors and tubes are introduced.
Ball Craze Sort is the perfect game to unwind or mentally recharge. Whether you’re looking to relax for a few minutes or challenge your logic skills for hours, this game offers the ideal balance between fun and focus.

title: Money Grabber
description: In Money Grabber you collect Money before it goes into the Shredder! Upgrade your machines using cards in this survivor style tower defence game, you can unlock new cards using gems as a gacha mechanic and upgrade your machines using coins!

title: Zooma Dragon
description:
Zooma Dragon is a brand new and amazing zoom style game!
Complete all 300 levels! Try to get three stars in each level!
A bright adventure with colored balls awaits you!
Instead of a frog, you will play as a dragon.

title: College Girl Coloring Dress Up
description:
BFF high school fashion makeover: coloring book & cool dress up games for girls!
New college girls dress up game & coloring book is here for you! Dress up the most popular high school girls, create their whole look, paint and color. These cool coloring pages and clothes design features made especially for fashion girls. Begin total fashion makeover with our girl dress up games!

Design outfits like a fashionista: dress up, choose hairstyle, necklaces and other amazing accessories such as skirts and dresses. Select a color and click on the fragment you want to color, when the painting of college girl is created, start drawing and coloring, become BFF fashion clothes designer.

Take screenshots, save as wallpaper, and share cute coloring pages with your friends and family absolutely for free.

title: Uncle Bullet 007
description:
Play as Uncle Bullet, a retired spy who’s back in the game to take down rival agents and save the day. Armed with an arsenal of bouncy bullets, you’ll use your wits and quick reflexes to outmaneuver foes and rescue hostages.

Shoot your bullets at walls, ceilings, and floors to make them bounce, ricochet, and curve around corners to hit your targets.

title: Crazy Traffic Control
description:
You control the traffic in the most realistic, craziest one-touch traffic game!
Put your timing and skills to the test with:

- realistic traffic 
- realistic acceleration   
- realistic stopping times!
- trains
- cows
- pedestrians

Unbelievably absorbing and incredibly fun — clear the intersections with Crazy Traffic Control!

title: Pubg Hack
description: Experience the ultimate shooting adventure. In Pubg Hack, you step into the battlefield as an elite soldier, exploring massive maps and engaging in fierce combat. Select a location to land and begin searching for supplies.

title: Digital Circus Run
description: In Digital Circus Run, the mysterious Caine creates casual parkour and endless running courses that you must traverse. In this virtual circus, you must assist the captives in escaping by navigating them through increasingly difficult stages. As you lead Pomni around the virtual circus, your abilities will be challenged.
